Import parsera\n\nfrom ui_utils import show_confirmation_dialog, AppStyles  # Import styl\u00f3w\nfrom debug_utils import debug_print, log_error\n\n\nclass ScrollableConflictDialog(QDialog):\n    \"\"\"\n    Niestandardowe okno dialogowe z przewijan\u0105 list\u0105 konflikt\u00f3w.\n    Wykorzystuje style aplikacji (ui_utils).\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parent, title, intro_text, details_html, question_text):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.setWindowTitle(title)\n        self.resize(500, 400)  # Domy\u015blny rozmiar, mo\u017cna rozci\u0105ga\u0107\n\n        # --- Pobieranie styl\u00f3w (Dark/Light mode) ---\n        is_dark = True\n        if parent:\n            if hasattr(parent, 'is_dark_theme'):\n                is_dark = parent.is_dark_theme\n            elif hasattr(parent, 'parent_widget') and hasattr(parent.parent_widget, 'is_dark_theme'):\n                is_dark = parent.parent_widget.is_dark_theme\n\n        theme = \"dark\" if is_dark else \"light\"\n\n        # Tekst wprowadzaj\u0105cy (np. \"Wykryto kolizje...\")\n        lbl_intro = QLabel(intro_text)\n        lbl_intro.setWordWrap(True)\n        # Zwi\u0119kszamy nieco czcionk\u0119 nag\u0142\u00f3wka\n        f = lbl_intro.font()\n        f.setBold(True)\n        lbl_intro.setFont(f)\n        layout.addWidget(lbl_intro)\n\n        # 2. Pytanie ko\u0144cowe\n        lbl_question = QLabel(question_text)\n        lbl_question.setWordWrap(True)\n        lbl_question.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)\n        layout.addWidget(lbl_question)\n\n        # 4. Przyciski\n        btn_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        btn_layout.addStretch()\n\n        self.btn_yes = QPushButton(\"Tak, usu\u0144 i wstaw\")\n        self.btn_no = QPushButton(\"Anuluj\")\n\n        # Aplikacja styl\u00f3w przycisk\u00f3w z ui_utils\n        try:\n            btn_style = AppStyles.get_button_style(theme)\n            self.btn_yes.setStyleSheet(btn_style)\n            self.btn_no.setStyleSheet(btn_style)\n        except:\n            pass\n\n        self.btn_yes.clicked.connect(self.accept)\n        self.btn_no.clicked.connect(self.reject)\n\n        btn_layout.addWidget(self.btn_yes)\n        btn_layout.addWidget(self.btn_no)\n        layout.addLayout(btn_layout)\n\n\nclass AbsenceWorkflowManager(QObject):\n    \"\"\"\n    Mened\u017cer steruj\u0105cy bezpiecznym wstawianiem nieobecno\u015bci.\n    Prezentuje pogrupowane konflikty w przewijanym oknie.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parent_window, data_provider):\n        super().__init__(parent_window)\n        self.parent = parent_window\n        self.data_provider = data_provider\n\n        # Stan operacji\n        self._pending_cells = []\n        self._pending_symbol = \"\"\n        self._success_callback = None\n\n        self._cancellation_thread = None\n        self._progress_dialog = None\n\n    def execute_safe_insertion(self, cells_data: list, symbol: str, success_callback, warning_msg: str = \"\"):\n        \"\"\"\n        G\u0142\u00f3wna metoda startowa.\n        \"\"\"\n        debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] === EXECUTE_SAFE_INSERTION CALLED ===\")\n        debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] Symbol: {symbol}, Cells count: {len(cells_data)}\")\n        if cells_data:\n            c0 = cells_data[0]\n            debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] First cell: uid={c0.get('uzytkownik_id')}, date={c0.get('date_str')}\")\n        \n        self._pending_cells = cells_data\n        self._pending_symbol = symbol\n        self._success_callback = success_callback\n\n        # 1. Sprawd\u017a czy to absencja (tylko one gryz\u0105 si\u0119 ze spotkaniami)\n        if symbol not in app_settings.get_absence_symbols():\n            debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] Symbol '{symbol}' NOT in absence symbols, skipping conflict check.\")\n            self._trigger_callback()\n            return\n\n        # 1.5. Sprawd\u017a i wyczy\u015b\u0107 symbol 'S' (wym\u00f3g Usera: UPDATE grafikipracy SET Symbol = ... ;S -> ;)\n        # Robimy to PRZED wykrywaniem konflikt\u00f3w, aby baza by\u0142a czysta.\n        cells_with_s_symbol = []\n        for cell in cells_data:\n            current_sym = cell.get('symbol', '')\n            parsed = parse_symbol(current_sym)\n            if (parsed.get('special_symbol') or '').upper() == 'S':\n                cells_with_s_symbol.append(cell)\n        \n        self._cells_to_clean_s = cells_with_s_symbol\n        if cells_with_s_symbol:\n            debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] Znaleziono {len(cells_with_s_symbol)} kom\u00f3rek z symbolem 'S'. Oznaczono do usuni\u0119cia PO potwierdzeniu.\")\n\n        debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] Symbol '{symbol}' IS an absence symbol, detecting conflicts...\")\n        # 2. Wykryj konflikty (z doklejonymi danymi UI)\n        conflicts = self._detect_conflicts(cells_data)\n\n        # 3. Decyzja\n        if not conflicts:\n            if warning_msg:\n                # Je\u015bli s\u0105 tylko ostrze\u017cenia (np. o urlopie), u\u017cywamy zwyk\u0142ego dialogu\n                full_msg = f\"{warning_msg}<br><br>Czy kontynuowa\u0107?\"\n                if show_confirmation_dialog(self.parent, \"Potwierdzenie\", full_msg, QMessageBox.Yes) == QMessageBox.Yes:\n                    self._perform_s_cleanup_if_needed()\n                    self._trigger_callback()\n            else:\n                self._perform_s_cleanup_if_needed()\n                self._trigger_callback()\n        else:\n            # Poka\u017c pogrupowane szczeg\u00f3\u0142y w nowym oknie\n            self._handle_cleanup_process(conflicts, warning_msg)\n\n    def _detect_conflicts(self, cells_data: list) -> list:\n        \"\"\"\n        Skanuje baz\u0119 i zwraca list\u0119 zdarze\u0144 do usuni\u0119cia.\n        Pr\u00f3buje znale\u017a\u0107 dok\u0142adn\u0105 nazw\u0119/opis zdarzenia.\n        \"\"\"\n        conflicting_events = []\n        BLOCKING_TYPES = {'Spotkanie', 'Szkolenie', 'Nadgodziny'}\n\n        processed_event_ids = set()\n\n        for cell in cells_data:\n            u_id = cell.get('uzytkownik_id')\n            d_str = cell.get('date_str')\n            user_name = cell.get('uzytkownik_dane', 'Nieznany')\n\n            # Active_only=True\n            events = self.data_provider.get_events_for_user_date(u_id, d_str, active_only=True)\n            debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] U={u_id} D={d_str} Events={len(events)}\")\n            for e in events:\n                debug_print(f\" -> Evt: ID={e.get('id')} Type={e.get('type')} Status={e.get('evt_status')}\")\n\n            for event in events:\n                evt_id = event.get('id')\n                # Typ og\u00f3lny (np. Szkolenie)\n                evt_type_raw = event.get('type') or event.get('evt_type')\n\n                if evt_type_raw in BLOCKING_TYPES and evt_id not in processed_event_ids:\n                    # --- FILTROWANIE STATUSU ---\n                    # UserReq 1 & 2: \n                    # - Pokazujemy tylko zdarzenia INNE ni\u017c \"Do delegacji\"\n                    # - UPDATE (czyli te\u017c pokazywanie do usuni\u0119cia) tylko dla Status = 1 (\"Delegowany\")\n                    # Rozr\u00f3\u017cniamy typy, bo Nadgodziny mog\u0105 mie\u0107 inne statusy.\n                    \n                    status_nazwa = event.get('evt_status') # StatusNazwa z SQL, zmapowane w DataProvider\n                    \n                    if evt_type_raw in ['Spotkanie', 'Szkolenie']:\n                        # Je\u015bli status to \"Do delegacji\", to ignorujemy (jest to tylko propozycja)\n                        if status_nazwa == 'Do delegacji':\n                            continue\n                            \n                        # ZMIANA: Usuwam filtrowanie status_nazwa != 'Delegowany'. \n                        # Konflikt jest konfliktem niezale\u017cnie od statusu (np. \"Zatwierdzony\", \"Nowy\").\n                        # Je\u015bli zdarzenie istnieje i nie jest anulowane (active_only=True), to blokuje grafik.\n                        # if status_nazwa != 'Delegowany':\n                        #    continue\n\n                    # --- LOGIKA WYCI\u0104GANIA NAZWY ---\n                    # UserReq 3: Pokazujemy Nazw\u0119 zdarzenia a nie jego typ\n                    \n                    # Priorytet: Nazwa -> Temat -> Opis -> Typ\n                    raw_name = event.get('evt_name') or event.get('name')\n                    raw_topic = event.get('evt_topic') or event.get('temat') or event.get('title')\n                    \n                    display_text = \"\"\n                    if raw_name and str(raw_name).strip():\n                        display_text = str(raw_name)\n                    elif raw_topic and str(raw_topic).strip():\n                        display_text = str(raw_topic)\n                    else:\n                        details = (event.get('description') or event.get('opis') or \"\")\n                        if details:\n                             display_text = details\n                        else:\n                             display_text = evt_type_raw # Fallback do typu\n\n                    # Formatowanie: \"Nazwa (Typ)\"\n                    # display_name = f\"<b>{display_text}</b> <span style='color:#888'>({evt_type_raw})</span>\"\n                    \n                    # Prostsza wersja: Po prostu nazwa (jak chcia\u0142 User)\n                    display_name = f\"<b>{display_text}</b>\"\n\n                    # Doklejamy dane do wy\u015bwietlania\n                    event['_ui_user_name'] = user_name\n                    event['_ui_date'] = d_str\n                    event['_ui_display_name'] = display_name\n\n                    conflicting_events.append(event)\n                    processed_event_ids.add(evt_id)\n\n        return conflicting_events\n\n    def _build_conflict_details_html(self, conflicts: list) -> str:\n        \"\"\"\n        Tworzy tre\u015b\u0107 HTML do ScrollableConflictDialog.\n        Grupuje: User -> Data -> Zdarzenia.\n        \"\"\"\n        grouped = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(list))\n\n        for evt in conflicts:\n            user = evt.get('_ui_user_name', 'Nieznany')\n            date = evt.get('_ui_date', '?')\n            display_name = evt.get('_ui_display_name', 'Zdarzenie')\n\n            # Godziny\n            start = evt.get('start_time') or evt.get('time_start')\n            end = evt.get('end_time') or evt.get('time_end')\n\n            if start and end:\n                display_name += f\" <small>({start}-{end})</small>\"\n\n            grouped[user][date].append(display_name)\n\n        # Generowanie HTML\n        html_parts = []\n\n        # Sortujemy u\u017cytkownik\u00f3w alfabetycznie\n        for user in sorted(grouped.keys()):\n            html_parts.append(f\"<h3 style='margin-bottom:2px; color:#4a90e2;'>{user}</h3>\")\n            html_parts.append(\"<ul style='margin-top:0px;'>\")\n\n            dates_dict = grouped[user]\n            for date in sorted(dates_dict.keys()):\n                events_list = dates_dict[date]\n                # Ka\u017cde zdarzenie w nowej linii dla danej daty\n                for evt_desc in events_list:\n                    html_parts.append(f\"<li><b>{date}</b>: {evt_desc}</li>\")\n\n            html_parts.append(\"</ul><hr>\")\n\n        return \"\".join(html_parts)\n\n    def _handle_cleanup_process(self, conflicts: list, extra_msg: str):\n        \"\"\"Uruchamia Custom Dialog.\"\"\"\n        count = len(conflicts)\n\n        # 1. Przygotuj dane\n        details_html = self._build_conflict_details_html(conflicts)\n\n        # 2. Teksty\n        intro = (f\"{extra_msg}<br>\" if extra_msg else \"\")\n        intro += (f\"Wykryto {count} koliduj\u0105cych zdarze\u0144.<br>\"\n                  \"Poni\u017csze spotkania/szkolenia musz\u0105 zosta\u0107 odwo\u0142ane:\")\n\n        question = f\"Czy usun\u0105\u0107 te zdarzenia i wstawi\u0107 '{self._pending_symbol}'?\"\n\n        # 3. Poka\u017c dedykowany dialog (Scrollable)\n        dialog = ScrollableConflictDialog(self.parent, \"Konflikt w grafiku\", intro, details_html, question)\n\n        if dialog.exec() != QDialog.Accepted:\n            return  # Anulowano\n\n        # 3b. Po potwierdzeniu - czy\u015bcimy symbol S\n        self._perform_s_cleanup_if_needed()\n\n        # 4. Je\u015bli OK -> Uruchom proces usuwania przez g\u0142\u00f3wnego mened\u017cera (DelegationCanceler)\n        # Dzi\u0119ki temu korzystamy ze sprawdzonej logiki od\u015bwie\u017cania UI i ikon.\n        \n        # Definiujemy ma\u0142y wrapper callbacka, bo DelegationCanceler zwraca argumenty\n        def cleanup_success_wrapper(count, affected_pairs):\n            debug_print(f\"AbsenceManager: Wyczyszczono poprzez DelegationCanceler {count}. Kontynuuj\u0119 wstawianie.\")\n            \n            # ZMIANA: Bezpo\u015brednie wymuszenie od\u015bwie\u017cenia ikon w rodzicu (bypass sygna\u0142u)\n            if hasattr(self.parent, 'force_update_icons_view'):\n                self.parent.force_update_icons_view(change_type='cleanup_explicit')\n                \n            self._trigger_callback()\n\n        if hasattr(self.parent, 'delegation_canceler'):\n             # Uruchom w trybie \"cichym\" (bez osobnego komunikatu sukcesu), \n             # bo zaraz i tak wstawimy absencj\u0119\n             self.parent.delegation_canceler.start_cancellation(\n                 conflicts, \n                 on_success=cleanup_success_wrapper, \n                 silent=True\n             )\n        else:\n             # Fallback (gdyby jakim\u015b cudem nie by\u0142o attributes)\n             log_error(\"AbsenceManager: Brak dost\u0119pu do delegation_canceler w rodzicu!\")\n             QMessageBox.critical(self.parent, \"B\u0142\u0105d\", \"Nie mo\u017cna uruchomi\u0107 usuwania konflikt\u00f3w.\")\n\n    def _trigger_callback(self):\n        if self._success_callback:\n            try:\n                self._success_callback(self._pending_cells, self._pending_symbol)\n            except Exception as e:\n                log_error(f\"AbsenceManager: B\u0142\u0105d callback: {e}\")\n                QMessageBox.critical(self.parent, \"B\u0142\u0105d\", f\"B\u0142\u0105d wstawiania:\\n{e}\")\n\n    def _perform_s_cleanup_if_needed(self):\n        \"\"\"Pomocnicza metoda do czyszczenia symbolu S, wywo\u0142ywana po potwierdzeniu.\"\"\"\n        if hasattr(self, '_cells_to_clean_s') and self._cells_to_clean_s:\n            debug_print(f\"[AbsenceManager] Wykonuj\u0119 op\u00f3\u017anione czyszczenie symbolu S ({len(self._cells_to_clean_s)} kom\u00f3rek).\")\n            if hasattr(self.parent, '_remove_s_symbol_directly'):\n                try:\n                    self.parent._remove_s_symbol_directly(self._cells_to_clean_s)\n                except Exception as e:\n                    log_error(f\"[AbsenceManager] B\u0142\u0105d podczas czyszczenia symbolu S: {e}\")\n            self._cells_to_clean_s = []  # Wspiera planowanie, delegowanie i monitoring dost\u0119pno\u015bci zespo\u0142\u00f3w o z\u0142o\u017conej strukturze (grupy, wydzia\u0142y, role).\n\n## G\u0142\u00f3wne Funkcjonalno\u015bci\n- **Grafik Pracy**: Interaktywna tabela (PySide6) z edycj\u0105 symboli, walidacj\u0105 konflikt\u00f3w i kolorowaniem zmian.\n- **Modu\u0142 Szkoleniowy**: Etapy/koszyki szkole\u0144, delegacje do pracownik\u00f3w, \u015bledzenie post\u0119pu (progress bars, statusy).\n- **Nieobecno\u015bci**: Workflow wniosk\u00f3w z automatyczn\u0105 detekcj\u0105 konflikt\u00f3w ze spotkaniami i szkoleniami.\n- **Delegacje/Zdarzenia**: Spotkania, szkolenia, nadgodziny ze statusami i zatwierdzaniem.\n- **Audyt**: Pe\u0142na historia zmian + okno `AuditLogWindow`.\n- **Real-time Sync**: `db_listener.py` nas\u0142uchuje SQL Server Service Broker.\n- **Export**: Excel (openpyxl) z konfigurowalnymi kolumnami i filtrami.\n- **Integracja Outlook**: `outlook_connector.py` dla kalendarza/powiadomie\u0144.\n\n## Stack Technologiczny\n- Python 3.11+, PySide6, MS SQL Server, pyodbc, openpyxl, pywin32\n\n## Role (RBAC)\n`Admin`, `SuperLider`, `Lider`, `Lider OUT`, `Pracownik WPR`, `Pracownik WPiR`, `Pracownik WPiS`\n\n## Aktualny Stan (2026-03-25)\n- [x] Modu\u0142 szkoleniowy: Konfigurator etap\u00f3w, mapowanie szkole\u0144, delegacje (Widok MS), Uczestnicy.\n- [x] Refaktoryzacja schematu DB szkole\u0144: `Uzytkownik` (int), `DataModyfikacji`, `Modyfikujacy`.\n- [x] Hasztagi etap\u00f3w przeniesione do osobnej tabeli `p_T_SL_EtapHasztagi`.\n- [x] `get_modifier_id()` zintegrowane z operacjami zapisu.\n\n\n## Sukces Projektu (Kiedy uznajemy, \u017ce gotowe?)\n- [ ] Stabilne dzia\u0142anie dla wszystkich r\u00f3l z dedykowanymi widokami.\n- [ ] "# app_settings.py\nimport json\nfrom collections import defaultdict\nfrom debug_utils import log_error, debug_print\nfrom _version import __version__ as APP_VERSION\n\nclass AppSettings:\n    \"\"\"Globalny kontener na ustawienia i logik\u0119 biznesow\u0105 \u0142adowan\u0105 z bazy danych.\"\"\"\n    def __init__(self):\n        self.REQUIRED_VERSION = APP_VERSION\n        self.ALLOWED_TEST_VERSION = None # Opcjonalna wersja testowa\n        self.FORCE_UPDATE = False\n        self.PERMISSIONS = defaultdict(set)\n        self.SYMBOL_CATEGORIES = {}\n        self.ABSENCE_SYMBOLS = set()\n        self.GROUP_MAPPING = {}\n        self.SHIFT_COLOR_MAP = {}\n        self.SYMBOL_PERMISSIONS = {}\n        self.WORK_LIKE_SYMBOLS = set()\n        self.LOGGING_USERS_FILE = set()\n        self.LOGGING_USERS_CONSOLE = set()\n        self.LOGGING_USERS_CRASH = set()  # U\u017cytkownicy dla kt\u00f3rych logujemy crashe do pliku\n        self.SUPER_LIDER_LOGINS = set()\n        self.ENABLE_NOTIFICATION_CENTER = True\n        self.SCHEDULE_CONTROL_ALL_MONTHS = False  # False = tylko nowy miesi\u0105c, True = wszystkie miesi\u0105ce\n canceled_count > 0:\n            if not self._silent_mode:\n                self.parent.statusBar().showMessage(f\"Pomy\u015blnie odwo\u0142ano {canceled_count} zdarze\u0144.\", 5000)\n            \n Klasyfikacja komunikat\u00f3w\n            type_names = {\n                QtMsgType.QtDebugMsg: \"DEBUG\",\n                QtMsgType.QtInfoMsg: \"INFO\",\n                QtMsgType.QtWarningMsg: \"WARNING\",\n                QtMsgType.QtCriticalMsg: \"CRITICAL\",\n                QtMsgType.QtFatalMsg: \"FATAL\"\n            }\n            type_name = type_names.get(msg_type, \"UNKNOWN\")\n            \n            # Formatuj pe\u0142ny komunikat\n            full_message = f\"[{timestamp}][Qt {type_name}] {message}\"\n            if context.file:\n                full_message += f\" ({context.file}:{context.line})\"\n            \n            # Loguj WARNING, CRITICAL i FATAL do pliku crash.log\n            if msg_type in (QtMsgType.QtWarningMsg, QtMsgType.QtCriticalMsg, QtMsgType.QtFatalMsg):\n                _write_to_crash_log(full_message)\n                \n                # Zapisz do bazy przez SessionManager\n    if _session_manager:\n        try:\n            # Skracamy crash_info do 4000 znak\u00f3w (limit SQL)\n            truncated_info = error_message[:4000] if len(error_message) > 4000 else error_message\n            _session_manager.end_session(exit_type=\"Crash\", crash_info=truncated_info)\n            _debug_log(\"Crash handler: Zapisano crash info do bazy.\")\n        except Exception as db_error:\n            _debug_log(f\"Crash handler: B\u0142\u0105d zapisu do bazy: {db_error}\")\n    \n    # 3.             suggestions.add((nr_kadrowy, date_str))\n\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Pobrano {len(suggestions)} sugestii wolnego dla {year}-{month}.\")\n            return suggestions\n month: int) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Sprawdza, czy grafik na dany miesi\u0105c jest opublikowany. U\u017cywa prostej pami\u0119ci podr\u0119cznej.\"\"\"\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        if cache_key in self.publish_status_cache:\n            return self.publish_status_cache[cache_key]\n\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n            query = f\"SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['datypublikacjigrafiku']} WHERE Rok=? AND Miesiac=? AND Status=1\"\n            cursor.execute(query, (year, month))\n            result = cursor.fetchone()\n\n            is_published = result is not None\n            self.publish_status_cache[cache_key] = is_published\n            debug_print(f\"Sprawdzono status publikacji dla {year}-{month}: {is_published}\")\n            return is_published\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d podczas sprawdzania statusu publikacji dla {year}-{month}: {e}\", exception=e)\n            # W przypadku b\u0142\u0119du, dla bezpiecze\u0144stwa za\u0142\u00f3\u017c, \u017ce jest opublikowany (wymagaj potwierdze\u0144)\n            return True\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def clear_publish_status_cache(self, year: int, month: int):\n        \"\"\"Czy\u015bci pami\u0119\u0107 podr\u0119czn\u0105 statusu publikacji dla konkretnego miesi\u0105ca.\"\"\"\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        if cache_key in self.publish_status_cache:\n            del self.publish_status_cache[cache_key]\n            debug_print(f\"Wyczyszczono cache statusu publikacji dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n    def get_schedule_audit_data(self, year: int, month: int, limit: Optional[int] = None) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera histori\u0119 zmian grafiku, z opcjonalnym limitem TOP N.\n        Cache jest u\u017cywany tylko wtedy, gdy pobierane s\u0105 wszystkie dane (limit=None).\n        \"\"\"\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        # U\u017cyj cache'a tylko, je\u015bli prosimy o pe\u0142ny zestaw danych\n        if limit is None and cache_key in self.audit_cache:\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: U\u017cywam cache dla danych audytowych dla {year}-{month}\")\n            return self.audit_cache[cache_key]\n\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n            # Dynamiczne budowanie zapytania w zale\u017cno\u015bci od limitu\n            if limit:\n                query = f\"SELECT TOP (?) * FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['fn_getscheduleauditdata']}(?, ?) ORDER BY DataModyfikacji DESC\"\n                params = (limit, year, month)\n            else:\n                # Zawsze sortuj, aby zachowa\u0107 sp\u00f3jno\u015b\u0107\n                query = f\"SELECT * FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['fn_getscheduleauditdata']}(?, ?) ORDER BY DataModyfikacji DESC\"\n                params = (year, month)\n\n            cursor.execute(query, params)\n            columns = [column[0] for column in cursor.description]\n            data = [dict(zip(columns, row)) for row in cursor.fetchall()]\n\n            debug_print(f\"Pobrano {len(data)} wierszy historii zmian dla {year}-{month} (limit: {limit})\")\n\n            # Zapisz w cache'u tylko pe\u0142ny wynik\n            if limit is None:\n                self.audit_cache[cache_key] = data\n\n            return data\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d podczas pobierania danych audytowych: {e}\", exception=e)\n            return []\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def clear_audit_cache(self, year: int, month: int):\n        \"\"\"Czy\u015bci cache dla danych audytowych dla konkretnego miesi\u0105ca.\"\"\"\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        if cache_key in self.audit_cache:\n            del self.audit_cache[cache_key]\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Usuni\u0119to cache danych audytowych dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n    def clear_monthly_cache(self, year: int, month: int):\n        \"\"\"Czy\u015bci g\u0142\u00f3wny cache danych miesi\u0119cznych dla danego miesi\u0105ca.\"\"\"\n        # Klucz dla `monthly_cache` to teraz (rok, miesi\u0105c)\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        if cache_key in self.monthly_cache:\n            del self.monthly_cache[cache_key]\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Usuni\u0119to z monthly_cache dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n        # Klucz dla cache ikon r\u00f3wnie\u017c jest (rok, miesi\u0105c)\n        if cache_key in self._icons_cache_by_month:\n            del self._icons_cache_by_month[cache_key]\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Usuni\u0119to z _icons_cache_by_month dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n    def get_dynamic_icons_for_cell(self, user_id: int, date_str: str) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Zwraca ikony z cache lub oblicza je na podstawie zdarze\u0144.\n        WERSJA ZMODYFIKOWANA: Ikona spotkania/szkolenia (ko\u0142o) jest pokazywana\n        tylko dla zdarze\u0144 w statusie 'Delegowany'.\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            year, month, _ = date_str.split('-')\n            year, month = int(year), int(month)\n        except:\n            return {'spotkania': 0, 'szkolenia': 0, 'nadgodziny': 0}\n\n        month_key = (year, month)\n        cell_key = (user_id, date_str)\n\n        # Sprawd\u017a cache ikon\n        if month_key in self._icons_cache_by_month:\n            month_icons_cache = self._icons_cache_by_month[month_key]\n            if cell_key in month_icons_cache:\n                return month_icons_cache[cell_key]\n\n        # Oblicz ikony na podstawie zdarze\u0144 (je\u015bli nie ma w cache)\n        container = self.monthly_cache.get(month_key)\n        events = []\n        if container and container.events_cache:\n            events = container.events_cache.get(cell_key, [])\n        else:\n            events = self.get_events_for_user_date(user_id, date_str)\n\n        # NOWA LOGIKA: Ikona ko\u0142a tylko dla statusu 'Delegowany'\n        has_spotkania = any(e.get('type') == 'Spotkanie' and e.get('status') == 'Delegowany' for e in events)\n        has_szkolenia = any(e.get('type') == 'Szkolenie' and e.get('status') == 'Delegowany' for e in events)\n\n        # Logika dla nadgodzin: status nie w ['0', 'Usuni\u0119ty']\n        inactive_statuses = {'0', 'Usuni\u0119ty'}\n        has_nadgodziny = any(e.get('type') == 'Nadgodziny' and str(e.get('status', '1')) not in inactive_statuses for e in events)\n\n        result = {\n            'spotkania': 1 if has_spotkania else 0,\n            'szkolenia': 1 if has_szkolenia else 0,\n            'nadgodziny': 1 if has_nadgodziny else 0\n        }\n\n        # Zapisz w cache ikon\n        if month_key not in self._icons_cache_by_month:\n            self._icons_cache_by_month[month_key] = {}\n        self._icons_cache_by_month[month_key][cell_key] = result\n\n        return result\n\n    def invalidate_specific_icons(self, user_date_pairs: List[Tuple[int, str]]):\n        \"\"\"\n        Wyczyszczenie cache ikon dla konkretnych par u\u017cytkownik-data.\n        Nie powinno ju\u017c by\u0107 potrzebne pe\u0142ne czyszczenie cache miesi\u0105ca tutaj.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not user_date_pairs:\n            return\n\n        affected_months = set()\n        for user_id, date_str in user_date_pairs:\n            try:\n                year, month, _ = date_str.split('-')\n                month_key = (int(year), int(month))\n                affected_months.add(month_key)\n\n                if month_key in self._icons_cache_by_month:\n                    cell_key = (user_id, date_str)\n                    if cell_key in self._icons_cache_by_month[month_key]:\n                        del self._icons_cache_by_month[month_key][cell_key]\n\n                # Zresetuj flag\u0119 obliczonych ikon dla kontenera, je\u015bli istnieje\n                if month_key in self.monthly_cache:\n                    self.monthly_cache[month_key]._icons_calculated_on_this_instance = False\n\n            except ValueError:\n                log_warning(f\"Nieprawid\u0142owy format daty w invalidate_specific_icons: {date_str}\")\n                continue\n\n        for year, month in affected_months:\n            debug_print(f\"Invalidate specific icons: Zresetowano cache ikon dla kom\u00f3rek w {year}-{month}\")\n            self.data_changed.emit(\"icons\", year, month)\n\n    def invalidate_icons_cache(self, year: int, month: int):\n        \"\"\"\n        Czy\u015bci *tylko* cache ikon dla danego miesi\u0105ca.\n        U\u017cywane, gdy wiemy, \u017ce zdarzenia mog\u0142y si\u0119 zmieni\u0107, ale dane grafiku nie.\n        \"\"\"\n        month_key = (year, month)\n\n        if month_key in self._icons_cache_by_month:\n            del self._icons_cache_by_month[month_key]\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Wyczy\u015bci\u0142 _icons_cache_by_month dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n        if month_key in self.monthly_cache:\n            # Wa\u017cne: zresetuj flag\u0119, aby ikony zosta\u0142y przeliczone przy nast\u0119pnym \u017c\u0105daniu get_processed_data\n            self.monthly_cache[month_key]._icons_calculated_on_this_instance = False\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Zresetowa\u0142 flag\u0119 _icons_calculated_on_this_instance dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n            # Mo\u017cna te\u017c rozwa\u017cy\u0107 od\u015bwie\u017cenie events_data i events_cache w kontenerze, je\u015bli to konieczne\n            # np. container = self.monthly_cache[month_key]\n            # container.events_data = self._fetch_events_data(year, month)\n            # container.events_cache = self._build_events_cache(container.events_data)\n            # container.last_updated = time.time()\n\n        self.data_changed.emit(\"icons\", year, month)\n\n    def get_forecast_data(self, year, month):\n        \"\"\"Pobiera dane prognozy dla danego miesi\u0105ca.\"\"\"\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        if cache_key in self.forecast_cache:\n            debug_print(f\"U\u017cywam cache dla prognozy dla {year}-{month}\")\n            return self.forecast_cache[cache_key]\n\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n            query = f\"SELECT * FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['fn_getforecastdata']} (?, ?)\"\n            cursor.execute(query, (year, month))\n\n            # Mapowanie na podstawie nazw kolumn zwr\u00f3conych przez baz\u0119\n            columns = [column[0] for column in cursor.description]\n            data = [dict(zip(columns, row)) for row in cursor.fetchall()]\n\n            debug_print(f\"Pobrano {len(data)} wierszy prognozy dla {year}-{month}\")\n            self.forecast_cache[cache_key] = data\n            return data\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d podczas pobierania danych prognozy: {e}\", exception=e)\n            return []\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    # --- NOWE METODY DO R\u00d3WNOLEG\u0141EGO POBIERANIA DANYCH ---\n\n    def fetch_schedule_standalone(self, year: int, month: int, grupa: int, funkcja: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera dane grafiku u\u017cywaj\u0105c W\u0141ASNEGO, NIEZALE\u017bNEGO po\u0142\u0105czenia do bazy.\n        Metoda bezpieczna dla w\u0105tk\u00f3w (thread-safe).\n        \"\"\"\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n            debug_print(f\"[THREAD-DB] Pobieranie grafiku STARTED (ConnID: {id(conn)})\")\n            data = self._fetch_schedule_data(year, month, grupa, funkcja, conn)\n            debug_print(f\"[THREAD-DB] Pobieranie grafiku DONE (Rows: {len(data)})\")\n            return data\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def fetch_events_standalone(self, year: int, month: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera dane zdarze\u0144 u\u017cywaj\u0105c W\u0141ASNEGO, NIEZALE\u017bNEGO po\u0142\u0105czenia do bazy.\n        Metoda bezpieczna dla w\u0105tk\u00f3w (thread-safe).\n        \"\"\"\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n            debug_print(f\"[THREAD-DB] Pobieranie zdarze\u0144 STARTED (ConnID: {id(conn)})\")\n            data = self._fetch_events_data(year, month, conn)\n            debug_print(f\"[THREAD-DB] Pobieranie zdarze\u0144 DONE (Rows: {len(data)})\")\n            return data\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def assemble_and_cache_data(self, year: int, month: int, schedule_data: List[Dict], events_data: List[Dict]) -> Optional[MonthlyDataContainer]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Sk\u0142ada pobrane r\u00f3wnolegle dane w gotowy kontener i zapisuje w cache.\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            cache_key = (year, month)\n            \n            # Budowanie cache i przetwarzanie (operacje CPU)\n            events_cache = self._build_events_cache(events_data)\n            processed_data_base = self._build_processed_data_without_icons(schedule_data, year, month)\n\n            container = MonthlyDataContainer(\n                schedule_data=schedule_data,\n                events_data=events_data,\n                processed_data_base=processed_data_base,\n                events_cache=events_cache,\n                last_updated=time.time()\n            )\n            \n            # Zobaczmy ile kluczy powsta\u0142o\n            debug_print(f\"[assemble_and_cache_data] Utworzono kontener. processed_data_base keys: {len(container.processed_data_base)}\")\n\n            # Zapis do cache (operacja atomowa w Pythonie dla s\u0142ownika)\n            self.monthly_cache[cache_key] = container\n            \n            # Ustawiamy parametry bie\u017c\u0105ce\n            self._current_year = year\n            self._current_month = month\n            \n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Z\u0142o\u017cono i zapisano dane (parallel) dla {year}-{month}.\")\n            return container\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"DataProvider: B\u0142\u0105d podczas sk\u0142adania danych: {e}\")\n            return None\n\n    # -----------------------------------------------------\n\n    def _get_or_load_monthly_data(self, year: int, month: int, grupa: int, funkcja: int, use_cache: bool = True) -> \\\n            Optional[MonthlyDataContainer]:\n        self._current_year = year\n        self._current_month = month\n\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n\n        if use_cache and cache_key in self.monthly_cache:\n            return self.monthly_cache[cache_key]\n\n        debug_print(\n            f\"DataProvider: Tworz\u0119 nowy/nadpisuj\u0119 kontener dla {year}-{month} (z filtrem grupa={grupa}, funkcja={funkcja})\")\n\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            # --- ZMIANA: Otw\u00f3rz jedno po\u0142\u0105czenie na ca\u0142\u0105 operacj\u0119 (wersja sekwencyjna) ---\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n\n            # Przeka\u017c istniej\u0105ce po\u0142\u0105czenie do metod pobieraj\u0105cych dane\n            schedule_data = self._fetch_schedule_data(year, month, grupa, funkcja, conn)\n            events_data = self._fetch_events_data(year, month, conn)\n            \n            # --- U\u017cywamy wsp\u00f3lnej metody do budowania kontenera ---\n            # Dzi\u0119ki temu unikamy duplikacji logiki\n            \n            # Uwaga: assemble_and_cache_data zapisuje do cache i ustawia self._current_*,\n            # wi\u0119c nie musimy tego robi\u0107 r\u0119cznie tutaj.\n            return self.assemble_and_cache_data(year, month, schedule_data, events_data)\n\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def get_schedule_data(self, year: int, month: int, grupa: int, funkcja: int, use_cache: bool = True) -> List[Any]:\n        container = self._get_or_load_monthly_data(year, month, grupa, funkcja, use_cache)\n        return container.schedule_data if container else []\n\n    def get_events_data(self, year: int, month: int, grupa: int, funkcja: int, use_cache: bool = True) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera dane zdarze\u0144, u\u017cywaj\u0105c poprawnego kontekstu filtra do za\u0142adowania kontenera.\"\"\"\n        container = self._get_or_load_monthly_data(year, month, grupa, funkcja, use_cache)\n        return container.events_data if container else []\n\n    def get_processed_data(self, year: int, month: int, grupa: int, funkcja: int) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Zwraca processed_data z dynamicznie obliczonymi ikonami i sugestiami wolnego.\n        \"\"\"\n        container = self._get_or_load_monthly_data(year, month, grupa, funkcja, use_cache=True)\n        if not container:\n            return {}\n\n        # --- NOWA, POPRAWIONA LOGIKA: Sugestie wolnego ---\n        # Sprawdzamy, czy sugestie zosta\u0142y ju\u017c zaaplikowane dla tego kontenera\n        if not getattr(container, '_suggestions_applied', False):\n            is_published = self.is_schedule_published(year, month)\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Status publikacji dla {year}-{month} to: {is_published}\")\n            if not is_published:\n                debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Grafik dla {year}-{month} nieopublikowany. Sprawdzam sugestie wolnego.\")\n                suggested_off_days = self._fetch_suggested_off_days(year, month)\n                if suggested_off_days:\n                    debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Znaleziono {len(suggested_off_days)} sugestii. Aplikuj\u0119 do danych.\")\n\n                    def _normalize_nr_kadrowy(val) -> Optional[str]:\n                        if val is None:\n                            return None\n                        s = str(val).strip()\n                        # je\u015bli same cyfry, por\u00f3wnaj po warto\u015bci liczbowej (eliminuje wiod\u0105ce zera)\n                        return str(int(s)) if s.isdigit() else s.upper()\n\n                    nr_kadrowy_to_key_map = {\n                        _normalize_nr_kadrowy(data.get('sched_nr_kadrowy')): key\n                        for key, data in container.processed_data_base.items()\n                        if data.get('sched_nr_kadrowy') is not None\n                    }\n\n                    for nr_kadrowy, date_str in suggested_off_days:\n                        norm_nr = _normalize_nr_kadrowy(nr_kadrowy)\n                        user_key = nr_kadrowy_to_key_map.get(norm_nr)\n                        if not user_key:\n                            # debug_print(\n                            #     f\"Sugestia wolnego: brak dopasowania dla nr_kadrowy={nr_kadrowy!r} (norm={norm_nr!r} data={date_str}\")\n                            continue\n\n                        try:\n                            day = int(date_str.split('-')[2])\n                            day_data = container.processed_data_base[user_key].setdefault('days', {}).setdefault(day,\n                                                                                                                 {})\n                            day_data['is_suggested_off'] = True\n                            # debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Ustawiono is_suggested_off=True dla {nr_kadrowy} w dniu {day}\")\n                        except (ValueError, IndexError, KeyError) as e:\n                            log_warning(f\"Nie uda\u0142o si\u0119 zastosowa\u0107 sugestii dla {nr_kadrowy} w dniu {date_str}: {e}\")\n                else:\n                    debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Brak sugestii wolnego dla {year}-{month}.\")\n            # Oznacz, \u017ce sugestie zosta\u0142y przetworzone dla tego kontenera\n            container._suggestions_applied = True\n\n        # Sprawd\u017a, czy ikony zosta\u0142y ju\u017c obliczone w tej sesji dla tego kontenera\n        if not container._icons_calculated_on_this_instance:\n            debug_print(\n                f\"DataProvider: Obliczam ikony dla {year}-{month} na \u017c\u0105danie w get_processed_data\")\n            self._update_dynamic_icons(container.processed_data_base, container.events_cache)\n            container._icons_calculated_on_this_instance = True\n\n        return container.processed_data_base\n\n    def get_department_to_group_mapping(self):\n        \"\"\"\n        Zwraca s\u0142ownik mapuj\u0105cy zagregowane grupy na zbiory wydzia\u0142\u00f3w (WydzialGrafik).\n        \"\"\"\n        # ZMIANA: Logika zosta\u0142a przeniesiona do centralnego obiektu app_settings\n        return app_settings.get_group_mapping()\n\n    def refresh_data(self, year: int, month: int, grupa: int, funkcja: int):\n        \"\"\"\n        Wymusza pe\u0142ne od\u015bwie\u017cenie danych dla miesi\u0105ca (np. po klikni\u0119ciu przycisku \"Od\u015bwie\u017c\").\n        \"\"\"\n        # ZMIANA 1: Klucz cache musi teraz uwzgl\u0119dnia\u0107 grup\u0119 i funkcj\u0119\n        cache_key = (year, month, grupa, funkcja)\n\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Wymuszone od\u015bwie\u017cenie danych dla {year}-{month} (grupa={grupa}, funkcja={funkcja})\")\n\n        if cache_key in self.monthly_cache:\n            del self.monthly_cache[cache_key]\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Usuni\u0119to stary kontener z monthly_cache dla klucza {cache_key}\")\n\n        # Klucz dla cache ikon jest niezale\u017cny od grupy/funkcji\n        icons_cache_key = (year, month)\n        if icons_cache_key in self._icons_cache_by_month:\n            del self._icons_cache_by_month[icons_cache_key]\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Usuni\u0119to _icons_cache_by_month dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n        # ZMIANA 2: Przeka\u017c 'grupa' i 'funkcja' do wywo\u0142ania poni\u017cej\n        container = self._get_or_load_monthly_data(year, month, grupa, funkcja, use_cache=False)\n\n        if container:\n            # Po \u015bwie\u017cym za\u0142adowaniu, get_processed_data obliczy ikony, je\u015bli b\u0119dzie to konieczne.\n            self.data_changed.emit(\"schedule\", year, month)\n            self.data_changed.emit(\"events\", year, month)\n            self.data_changed.emit(\"icons\", year, month)\n        else:\n            log_error(f\"DataProvider: Nie uda\u0142o si\u0119 od\u015bwie\u017cy\u0107 danych dla {year}-{month}\")\n\n    def is_schedule_published(self, year: int, month: int) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"\n        Sprawdza w bazie danych, czy grafik dla danego roku i miesi\u0105ca jest opublikowany.\n        Zwraca True, je\u015bli jest opublikowany, False w przeciwnym razie.\n        \"\"\"\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n            # U\u017cywamy SQL_OBJECTS z config \n            from config import SQL_OBJECTS\n            \n            query = f\"SELECT TOP 1 Id FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['datypublikacjigrafiku']} WHERE Status=1 AND Rok=? AND Miesiac=?\"\n            result = cursor.execute(query, (year, month)).fetchone()\n            return bool(result)\n        except Exception as e:\n            from debug_utils import log_error\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d sprawdzania statusu publikacji w DataProvider: {e}\")\n            return False \n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def refresh_events_data(self, year: int, month: int):\n        \"\"\"\n        Wymusza od\u015bwie\u017cenie tylko danych o zdarzeniach (events) dla danego miesi\u0105ca,\n        zachowuj\u0105c reszt\u0119 cache'u.\n        \"\"\"\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        container = self.monthly_cache.get(cache_key)\n\n        if not container:\n            debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Brak kontenera dla {year}-{month} do od\u015bwie\u017cenia zdarze\u0144. Pomijam.\")\n            return\n\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Wymuszone od\u015bwie\u017cenie ZDARZE\u0143 dla {year}-{month}.\")\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            # --- NOWA LOGIKA: U\u017cycie jednego po\u0142\u0105czenia ---\n            conn = self.db_connector.get_connection()\n            fresh_events_data = self._fetch_events_data(year, month, conn)\n            container.events_data = fresh_events_data\n            container.events_cache = self._build_events_cache(fresh_events_data)\n            container.last_updated = time.time()\n            container._icons_calculated_on_this_instance = False\n            self.data_changed.emit(\"events\", year, month)\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d w refresh_events_data: {e}\", exception=e)\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def _update_dynamic_icons(self, processed_data_target: Dict, events_cache: Dict):\n        \"\"\"\n        Nak\u0142ada informacje o ikonach na dostarczony s\u0142ownik `processed_data_target`.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not self._current_year or not self._current_month:\n            return\n\n        # Mapa kluczy (bo processed_data_target ma klucz jako krotk\u0119)\n        user_id_to_key_map = {key[3]: key for key in processed_data_target.keys()}\n\n        for key, user_data in processed_data_target.items():\n            user_id = key[3]\n            days_data = user_data.get('days', {})\n\n            for day, day_data_dict in days_data.items():\n                date_str = f\"{self._current_year}-{self._current_month:02d}-{day:02d}\"\n                events_for_cell = events_cache.get((user_id, date_str), [])\n\n                # --- LOGIKA IKON ---\n                has_spotkania = False\n                has_szkolenia = False\n                has_nadgodziny = False\n                active_events = []\n\n                for e in events_for_cell:\n                    # Pobieranie typu i statusu niezale\u017cnie od prefiksu (evt_ lub bez)\n                    e_type = e.get('evt_type') or e.get('type')\n                    e_status = e.get('evt_status') or e.get('status')\n\n                    # Filtrowanie usuni\u0119tych (status '0' lub 'Usuni\u0119ty')\n                    if str(e_status) in ['0', 'Usuni\u0119ty']:\n                        continue\n\n                    active_events.append(e)\n\n                    # Spotkania/Szkolenia tylko je\u015bli status to 'Delegowany'\n                    if e_status == 'Delegowany':\n                        if e_type == 'Spotkanie':\n                            has_spotkania = True\n                        elif e_type == 'Szkolenie':\n                            has_szkolenia = True\n\n                    # Nadgodziny zawsze je\u015bli aktywne\n                    if e_type == 'Nadgodziny':\n                        has_nadgodziny = True\n\n                day_data_dict['spotkania'] = 1 if has_spotkania else 0\n                day_data_dict['szkolenia'] = 1 if has_szkolenia else 0\n                day_data_dict['nadgodziny'] = 1 if has_nadgodziny else 0\n                day_data_dict['events'] = active_events\n\n        # P\u0119tla dla nadgodzin w dni wolne - r\u00f3wnie\u017c wymaga aktualizacji logiki dla spotka\u0144/szkole\u0144\n        for (user_id, date_str), events_for_cell in events_cache.items():\n            try:\n                # Sprawdzamy tylko aktywne nadgodziny (status nie w ['0', 'Usuni\u0119ty'])\n                inactive_statuses = {'0', 'Usuni\u0119ty'}\n                active_overtime = any(\n                    e.get('type') == 'Nadgodziny' and str(e.get('status', '1')) not in inactive_statuses for e in events_for_cell)\n                if not active_overtime:\n                    continue\n\n                user_key = user_id_to_key_map.get(user_id)\n                if not user_key:\n                    continue\n\n                user_data = processed_data_target[user_key]\n                day = int(date_str.split('-')[2])\n\n                # Dodajemy ikon\u0119 tylko, je\u015bli nie ma jeszcze wpisu dla tego dnia w grafiku\n                if day not in user_data.get('days', {}):\n                    day_data_dict = user_data.setdefault('days', {}).setdefault(day, {})\n                    day_data_dict['nadgodziny'] = 1\n\n                    # Utrzymujemy list\u0119 wszystkich aktywnych zdarze\u0144 (status nie w ['0', 'Usuni\u0119ty'])\n                    active_events = [e for e in events_for_cell if str(e.get('status', '1')) not in inactive_statuses]\n\n                    # NOWA LOGIKA DLA IKONY KO\u0141A (dla dni wolnych)\n                    day_data_dict['spotkania'] = 1 if any(\n                        e.get('type') == 'Spotkanie' and e.get('status') == 'Delegowany' for e in\n                        events_for_cell) else 0\n                    day_data_dict['szkolenia'] = 1 if any(\n                        e.get('type') == 'Szkolenie' and e.get('status') == 'Delegowany' for e in\n                        events_for_cell) else 0\n                    day_data_dict['events'] = active_events\n                    # debug_print(f\"Dodano ikon\u0119 nadgodzin w dniu wolnym dla user_id: {user_id}, dzie\u0144: {day}\")\n\n            except (ValueError, IndexError) as e:\n                log_warning(f\"B\u0142\u0105d przetwarzania zdarzenia dla dnia wolnego ({user_id}, {date_str}): {e}\")\n                continue\n\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider (ZMODYFIKOWANA WERSJA): Zako\u0144czono _update_dynamic_icons.\")\n\n    def _build_processed_data_without_icons(self, schedule_data: List[Dict], year: int, month: int) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"\n        Przetwarza dane z ju\u017c spivotowanego zapytania SQL.\n        WERSJA FINALNA UI: Wy\u015bwietla TYLKO GODZINY (Start;Czas).\n        \"\"\"\n        if not year or not month or not schedule_data:\n            return {}\n\n        from app_settings import app_settings\n        # Upewnij si\u0119, \u017ce ColumnDefinitions jest zaimportowane na g\u00f3rze pliku!\n        cols = ColumnDefinitions.SCHEDULE_COLUMNS\n\n        processed_data = {}\n        absence_set = app_settings.get_absence_symbols()\n\n        for row_dict in schedule_data:\n            # --- POPRAWKA: U\u017cywamy .name, aby pobra\u0107 dane po nazwie SQL ---\n            uzytkownik_id = row_dict.get(cols['sched_user_id'].name, 0)\n\n            key = (\n                row_dict.get(cols['sched_wydzial'].name, ''),  # WydzialGrafik\n                row_dict.get(cols['sched_przelozony'].name, ''),  # PrzelozonyDane\n                row_dict.get(cols['sched_user_display'].name, ''),  # UzytkownikDane\n                uzytkownik_id\n            )\n            # ---------------------------------------------------------------\n\n            processed_data[key] = {\n                'days': {},\n                'total_hours': 0,\n                # Tutaj ju\u017c by\u0142o poprawnie, ale dla pewno\u015bci pe\u0142na lista:\n                'sched_rola': row_dict.get(cols['sched_rola'].name),\n                'sched_podrola': row_dict.get(cols['sched_podrola'].name),\n                'sched_etat': row_dict.get(cols['sched_etat'].name, 0),\n                'sched_jezyk': row_dict.get(cols['sched_jezyk'].name),\n                'sched_korekta': row_dict.get(cols['sched_korekta'].name, 0),\n                'sched_dtn': row_dict.get(cols['sched_dtn'].name, 0),\n                'sched_user_name': row_dict.get(cols['sched_user_name'].name),\n                'sched_przelozony': row_dict.get(cols['sched_przelozony'].name),\n                'sched_przelozony_nazwisko': row_dict.get(cols['sched_przelozony_nazwisko'].name),\n                'sched_nr_kadrowy': row_dict.get(cols['sched_nr_kadrowy'].name, ''),\n                'sched_lokalizacja': row_dict.get(cols['sched_lokalizacja'].name),\n                'sched_komentarz': row_dict.get(cols['sched_komentarz'].name),\n                'sched_system_pracy': row_dict.get(cols['sched_system_pracy'].name),\n                'sched_grafik_za_punkty': row_dict.get(cols['sched_grafik_za_punkty'].name),\n                'sched_brak_nocki': row_dict.get(cols['sched_brak_nocki'].name),\n                'sched_user_id': uzytkownik_id,\n                'sched_login': row_dict.get(cols['sched_login'].name, ''),\n                'sched_rka': row_dict.get(cols['sched_rka'].name, ''),\n                'sched_email': row_dict.get(cols['sched_email'].name, '')\n            }\n\n            calculated_total_hours = 0\n            for day in range(1, 32):\n                symbol = row_dict.get(str(day))\n\n                if symbol is not None:\n                    parsed_symbol = parse_symbol(symbol)\n                    work_h = parsed_symbol.get('work_hours', 0) or 0\n                    calculated_total_hours += work_h\n                    start_hour = parsed_symbol.get('start_hour')\n                    spec = parsed_symbol.get('special_symbol')\n                    spec_upper = spec.upper() if spec else \"\"\n\n                    display_value = \"\"\n                    if start_hour is not None:\n                        if work_h is not None:\n                            val_float = float(work_h)\n                            val_str = str(int(val_float)) if val_float.is_integer() else str(val_float)\n                            display_value = f\"{start_hour};{val_str}\"\n                        else:\n                            display_value = str(start_hour)\n\n                    bg_color = None\n                    if spec_upper and (spec_upper in absence_set or spec_upper in [\"OS\", \"U\", \"UZ\"]):\n                        if spec_upper in [\"OS\", \"U\", \"UZ\"]:\n                            bg_color = \"#FFFF00\"\n                        else:\n                            bg_color = \"#9370DB\"\n                    elif start_hour is not None:\n                        try:\n                            bg_color = app_settings.SHIFT_COLOR_MAP.get(int(start_hour), \"#FFFFFF\")\n                        except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                            bg_color = None\n\n                    processed_data[key]['days'][day] = {\n                        'symbol': symbol, 'hours': work_h, 'start_hour': start_hour,\n                        '_display_value': display_value, '_bg_color_hex': bg_color\n                    }\n\n            processed_data[key]['total_hours'] = calculated_total_hours\n\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Zako\u0144czono budowanie danych (Pre-kalkulacja - Tylko Godziny).\")\n        return processed_data\n\n    @lru_cache(maxsize=100)  # Cache dla kluczy miesi\u0119cy\n    def _get_month_cache_key(self, year: int, month: int) -> tuple:\n        \"\"\"Cache key dla miesi\u0105ca\"\"\"\n        return (year, month)\n\n    def get_events_for_user_date(self, user_id: int, date_str: str, active_only: bool = True) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Zwraca list\u0119 zdarze\u0144 dla danego u\u017cytkownika i daty.\n        Je\u015bli active_only=True, zwraca tylko zdarzenia ze statusem innym ni\u017c '0'.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not date_str or not user_id or date_str.count('-') != 2:\n            return []\n\n        try:\n            year, month, _ = date_str.split('-')\n            year, month = int(year), int(month)\n        except (ValueError, TypeError):\n            return []\n\n        cache_key = (year, month)\n        container = self.monthly_cache.get(cache_key)\n\n        if not container:\n            log_warning(f\"DataProvider: Brak kontenera w cache dla klucza {cache_key} w get_events_for_user_date.\")\n            return []\n\n        standardized_date = self._standardize_date(date_str)\n        cache_key_event = (user_id, standardized_date)\n\n        events_for_cell = container.events_cache.get(cache_key_event, [])\n\n        if not active_only:\n            return events_for_cell\n\n        # Status \"aktywny\" oznacza status nie w ['0', 'Usuni\u0119ty']\n        # Uwaga: 'Do delegacji' i 'Delegowany' s\u0105 oba \"aktywne\" w sensie nie-usuni\u0119te\n        # Ale ikony spotka\u0144/szkole\u0144 pokazuj\u0105 si\u0119 TYLKO dla 'Delegowany'\n        inactive_statuses = {'0', 'Usuni\u0119ty'}\n        active_events = [e for e in events_for_cell if str(e.get('status', '1')) not in inactive_statuses]\n        return active_events\n\n    def _fetch_schedule_data(self, year: int, month: int, grupa: int, funkcja: int, conn) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera dane grafiku z bazy, u\u017cywaj\u0105c istniej\u0105cego po\u0142\u0105czenia.\"\"\"\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        query = f\"SELECT * FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['fn_getscheduledata']}(?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n        cursor.execute(query, (year, month, grupa, funkcja))\n        columns = [column[0] for column in cursor.description]\n\n        # --- DIAGNOSTYKA: Wypisz dost\u0119pne kolumny ---\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Kolumny z bazy SQL: {columns}\")\n        # --------------------------------------------\n\n        schedule_data = [dict(zip(columns, row)) for row in cursor.fetchall()]\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Pobrane dane grafiku (nowy format): {len(schedule_data)} wierszy.\")\n        return schedule_data\n\n    def _fetch_events_data(self, year: int, month: int, conn) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera i mapuje zdarzenia.\n        WERSJA DIAGNOSTYCZNA: Wypisuje dost\u0119pne kolumny i szuka pracownika 'si\u0142owo'.\n        \"\"\"\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        from column_definitions import ColumnDefinitions\n        cols = ColumnDefinitions.EVENTS_COLUMNS\n\n        query = f\"SELECT * FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['fn_geteventsdata']}(?, ?)\"\n        cursor.execute(query, (year, month))\n\n        if not cursor.description:\n            return []\n\n        columns = [column[0] for column in cursor.description]\n        raw_events_as_dicts = [dict(zip(columns, row)) for row in cursor.fetchall()]\n\n        # --- DIAGNOSTYKA: TO POKA\u017bE W KONSOLI PRAWDZIWE NAZWY KOLUMN ---\n        if raw_events_as_dicts:\n            first_row_keys = list(raw_events_as_dicts[0].keys())\n            debug_print(f\"!!! KOLUMNY ZDARZE\u0143 Z SQL !!!: {first_row_keys}\")\n        # ---------------------------------------------------------------\n\n        processed_events = []\n        for raw_event in raw_events_as_dicts:\n            try:\n                # --- KROK 1: BRUTE FORCE (Szukanie danych pracownika) ---\n                # Szukamy warto\u015bci w kolumnach, kt\u00f3re mog\u0105 zawiera\u0107 nazwisko\n                user_display = \"\"\n\n                # Lista priorytetowa znanych nazw\n                priority_keys = [\n                    cols['evt_user_display'].name,  # UzytkownikDane\n                    'NazwiskoImie',\n                    'Pracownik',\n                    'UzytkownikDane',\n                    'User',\n                    'UserName',\n                    'PracownikNazwa'\n                ]\n\n                # Najpierw sprawd\u017a znane klucze\n                for key in priority_keys:\n                    val = raw_event.get(key)\n                    if val and str(val).strip():\n                        user_display = str(val)\n                        break\n\n                # Je\u015bli nadal pusto, szukaj w DOWOLNEJ kolumnie zawieraj\u0105cej \"Nazwisko\" lub \"Dane\" w nazwie\n                if not user_display:\n                    for key, val in raw_event.items():\n                        key_lower = key.lower()\n                        if ('nazwisko' in key_lower or 'dane' in key_lower or 'pracownik' in key_lower) and val:\n                            # Ignoruj kolumny z datami (DataModyfikacji, PrzelozonyDane itp)\n                            if 'data' not in key_lower and 'przelozony' not in key_lower:\n                                user_display = str(val)\n                                break\n                # ------------------------------------------------------\n\n                event = {\n                    'evt_type': raw_event.get(cols['evt_type'].name),\n                    'evt_id': raw_event.get(cols['evt_id'].name),\n                    'evt_topic': raw_event.get(cols['evt_topic'].name),\n                    'evt_name': raw_event.get(cols['evt_name'].name),\n                    'evt_user_id': raw_event.get(cols['evt_user_id'].name),\n\n                    'evt_user_display': user_display,  # <-- Tutaj trafi znaleziona warto\u015b\u0107\n\n                    'evt_date': raw_event.get(cols['evt_date'].name),\n                    'evt_time_from': raw_event.get(cols['evt_time_from'].name),\n                    'evt_time_to': raw_event.get(cols['evt_time_to'].name),\n                    'evt_status': raw_event.get(cols['evt_status'].name),\n                    'evt_modified_date': raw_event.get(cols['evt_modified_date'].name)\n                }\n\n                # Dodatkowe klucze pomocnicze\n                event['user_id'] = event['evt_user_id']\n                event['date_key'] = self._standardize_date(event['evt_date'])\n                event['id'] = event['evt_id']\n                event['type'] = event['evt_type']\n                event['status'] = event['evt_status']\n                event['topic'] = event['evt_topic']\n                event['name'] = event['evt_name']\n\n                # Formatowanie dat/godzin\n                for key in ['evt_time_from', 'evt_time_to', 'evt_modified_date']:\n                    value = event.get(key)\n                    if hasattr(value, 'strftime'):\n                        event[key] = value.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')\n\n                # Mapowanie starych kluczy czasowych\n                event['time_from'] = event['evt_time_from']\n                event['time_to'] = event['evt_time_to']\n\n                processed_events.append(event)\n            except Exception as e:\n                log_error(f\"DataProvider: B\u0142\u0105d przetwarzania zdarzenia: {e}\")\n                continue\n\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Przetworzono {len(processed_events)} zdarze\u0144.\")\n        return processed_events\n\n    def _build_events_cache(self, events_data: List[Dict]) -> Dict[Tuple[int, str], List[Dict]]:\n        \"\"\"Buduje cache zdarze\u0144 (user_id, date_key) -> [list_of_events]\"\"\"\n        events_cache = {}\n        for event in events_data:\n            user_id = event.get('user_id')\n            date_key = self._standardize_date(event.get('date_key', ''))  # U\u017cyj znormalizowanej daty\n\n            if user_id and date_key:\n                cache_key_event = (user_id, date_key)  # Poprawiono nazw\u0119 zmiennej\n                if cache_key_event not in events_cache:\n                    events_cache[cache_key_event] = []\n                events_cache[cache_key_event].append(event)\n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Zbudowano events_cache z {len(events_cache)} wpisami.\")\n        return events_cache\n\n    def _fetch_events_for_pairs(self, user_date_pairs: List[Tuple[int, str]], conn) -> Dict[Tuple[int, str], List[Dict]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera zdarzenia TYLKO dla konkretnych par (user_id, date_str).\n        Znacznie szybsze ni\u017c \u0142adowanie ca\u0142ego miesi\u0105ca.\n        \n        Args:\n            user_date_pairs: Lista par (user_id, date_str w formacie YYYY-MM-DD)\n            conn: Aktywne po\u0142\u0105czenie z baz\u0105 danych\n            \n        Returns:\n            Dict[Tuple[int, str], List[Dict]]: {(user_id, date_str): [events]}\n        \"\"\"\n        if not user_date_pairs:\n            return {}\n        \n        from column_definitions import ColumnDefinitions\n        cols = ColumnDefinitions.EVENTS_COLUMNS\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n        result = {}\n        \n        debug_print(f\"DataProvider: Pobieranie zdarze\u0144 dla {len(user_date_pairs)} par (user_id, date)...\")\n        \n        for user_id, date_str in user_date_pairs:\n            # Normalizuj dat\u0119 do formatu YYYY-MM-DD\n            std_date = self._standardize_date(date_str)\n            if not std_date or std_date.count('-') != 2:\n                result[(user_id, std_date)] = []\n                continue\n            \n            year, month, day = map(int, std_date.split('-'))\n            \n            # Pobierz zdarzenia dla tej konkretnej pary u\u017cywaj\u0105c funkcji tabelarycznej z filtrem\n            query = f\"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM {SQL_OBJECTS['fn_geteventsdata']}(?, ?)\n                WHERE Uzytkownik = ? AND CONVERT(date, Data) = ?\n            \"\"\"\n            try:\n                cursor.execute(query, (year, month, user_id, std_date))\n                \n                if not cursor.description:\n                    result[(user_id, std_date)] = []\n                    continue\n                \n                columns = [c[0] for c in cursor.description]\n                raw_rows = [dict(zip(columns, row)) for row in cursor.fetchall()]\n                \n                # Przetw\u00f3rz na format wewn\u0119trzny (podobnie jak w _fetch_events_data)\n                processed = []\n                for raw_event in raw_rows:\n                    try:\n                        # Znajd\u017a dane u\u017cytkownika\n                        user_display = \"\"\n                        priority_keys = [\n                            cols['evt_user_display'].name,\n                            'NazwiskoImie', 'Pracownik', 'UzytkownikDane'\n                        ]\n                        for key in priority_keys:\n                            val = raw_event.get(key)\n                            if val and str(val).strip():\n                                user_display = str(val)\n                                break\n                        \n                        event = {\n                            'evt_type': raw_event.get(cols['evt_type'].name),\n                            'evt_id': raw_event.get(cols['evt_id'].name),\n                            'evt_topic': raw_event.get(cols['evt_topic'].name),\n                            'evt_name': raw_event.get(cols['evt_name'].name),\n                            'evt_user_id': raw_event.get(cols['evt_user_id'].name),\n                            'evt_user_display': user_display,\n                            'evt_date': raw_event.get(cols['evt_date'].name),\n                            'evt_time_from': raw_event.get(cols['evt_time_from'].name),\n                            'evt_time_to': raw_event.get(cols['evt_time_to'].name),\n                            'evt_status': raw_event.get(cols['evt_status'].name),\n                            'evt_modified_date': raw_event.get(cols['evt_modified_date'].name)\n                        }\n                        \n                        # Klucze pomocnicze\n                        event['user_id'] = event['evt_user_id']\n                        event['date_key'] = self._standardize_date(event['evt_date'])\n                        event['id'] = event['evt_id']\n                        event['type'] = event['evt_type']\n                        event['status'] = event['evt_status']\n                        \n W\u0105tek nas\u0142uchuj\u0105cy na powiadomienia z kolejki SQL Server Service Broker.\n    Wersja z obs\u0142ug\u0105 identyfikatora modyfikuj\u0105cego i rozszerzon\u0105 obs\u0142ug\u0105 super().__init__(parent)\n        self.queue_name = queue_name\n        self._is_cancelled = False\n        self._consecutive_errors = 0\n        self._max_consecutive_errors = 5\n\n    def conn = None\n\n        # Wyodr\u0119bnij nazw\u0119 kolejki bez schematu dla zapyta\u0144 systemowych\n        queue_name_only = self.queue_name.replace('dbo.', '').replace('[', '').replace(']', '{queue_name_only}' \n                            AND is_receive_enabled = 0\n                        )\n                        BEGIN\n                            ALTER QUEUE {self.queue_name} WITH debug_print(f\"ServiceBrokerListener: W\u0142\u0105czono wy\u0142\u0105czon\u0105 kolejk\u0119 {self.queue_name}\")\n                    conn.commit()\n                except Exception as \".join(map(str, args))\n\n        if LOG_TO_CONSOLE:\n            print(f\"[{current_time}][DEBUG] {message}\", **kwargs)\n\n        if LOG_TO_FILE:\n            current_datetime = Od\u015bwie\u017c widok\n            self.layoutChanged.emit()\n\n    def update_data(self, events_data):\n        self.beginResetModel()\n        self._data = events_data.copy() if events_data else []\n        self._filtered_data = events_data.copy() if events_data else []\n        self.endResetModel()\n\n    def filtered_update(self, filtered_data):\n        self.beginResetModel()\n        self._filtered_data = filtered_data.copy() if filtered_data else []\n        self.endResetModel()\n\n        debug_print(\n            f\"Model zdarze\u0144 zaktualizowany (tylko filtrowane dane): {len(self._data)} zdarze\u0144 w modelu, {len(self._filtered_data)} widocznych\")\n\n    def sort(self, column, order):\n        \"\"\"Sortuje dane modelu wedle wskazanej kolumny.\"\"\"\n        self.layoutAboutToBeChanged.emit()\n        sort_field = self._column_to_field.get(column)\n        if not sort_field:\n            self.layoutChanged.emit()\n            return\n\n        # Domy\u015blna warto\u015b\u0107 dla None, aby unikn\u0105\u0107 b\u0142\u0119d\u00f3w\n        default_value = 0 if column == 0 else ''\n        sort_key = lambda x: x.get(sort_field) or default_value\n\n        try:\n            self._filtered_data.sort(key=sort_key, reverse=(order == Qt.DescendingOrder))\n        except TypeError as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d sortowania w EventsTableModel (kolumna {column}): {e}\", exception=e)\n\n        self.layoutChanged.emit()\n\n\n    def filter_data(self, **filter_params):\n        \"\"\"\n        Filtruje dane modelu na podstawie podanych parametr\u00f3w.\n        Zoptymalizowana wersja, kt\u00f3ra aktualizuje tylko przefiltrowane dane.\n\n        Args:\n            **filter_params: Parametry filtrowania (allowed_types, topic, name, date_from, date_to)\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Zapami\u0119taj liczb\u0119 wierszy przed filtrowaniem\n            old_row_count = len(self._filtered_data)\n\n            # Je\u015bli nie ma parametr\u00f3w filtrowania, poka\u017c wszystkie dane\n            if not filter_params:\n                if len(self._filtered_data) != len(self._data):\n                    # Liczba wierszy si\u0119 zmieni, wykonaj pe\u0142ny reset\n                    self.beginResetModel()\n                    self._filtered_data = self._data.copy()\n                    self.endResetModel()\n                return\n\n            # Przygotuj przefiltrowane dane\n            filtered_data = []\n\n            # Klucze filtrowania\n            date_from_filter = filter_params.get('date_from')\n            date_to_filter = filter_params.get('date_to')\n            topic_filter = filter_params.get('topic', '').lower()\n            name_filter = filter_params.get('name', '').lower()\n            allowed_types_filter = filter_params.get('allowed_types')\n\n            # U\u017cyj cache'a filtrowania je\u015bli istnieje i parametry si\u0119 zgadzaj\u0105\n            cache_key = self._generate_filter_cache_key(filter_params)\n            if hasattr(self, '_filter_cache') and cache_key in self._filter_cache:\n                filtered_data = self._filter_cache[cache_key]\n            else:\n                # Filtruj wszystkie dane wed\u0142ug kryteri\u00f3w\n                for event in self._data:\n                    event_type = event.get('evt_type')  # By\u0142o 'type'\n                    event_date_str = event.get('date_key', '')\n                    event_topic = str(event.get('evt_topic', '')).lower()  # By\u0142o 'topic'\n                    event_name = str(event.get('evt_name', '')).lower()  # By\u0142o 'name'\n\n                    # Najpierw sprawd\u017a typ zdarzenia - najszybsze kryterium\n                    if allowed_types_filter and event_type not in allowed_types_filter:\n                        continue\n\n                    # Nast\u0119pnie sprawd\u017a dat\u0119 - kolejne najszybsze kryterium\n                    event_date = self._standardize_date(event_date_str)\n                    if (date_from_filter and event_date < date_from_filter) or \\\n                       (date_to_filter and event_date > date_to_filter):\n                        continue\n\n                    # Na ko\u0144cu sprawd\u017a kryteria tekstowe - najwolniejsze\n                    if topic_filter and topic_filter not in event_topic:\n                        continue\n\n                    if name_filter and name_filter not in event_name:\n                        continue\n\n                    # Je\u015bli wszystkie kryteria s\u0105 spe\u0142nione, dodaj zdarzenie do przefiltrowanych danych\n                    filtered_data.append(event)\n\n                # Zapisz w cache dla przysz\u0142ego u\u017cycia\n                if not hasattr(self, '_filter_cache'):\n                    self._filter_cache = {}\n                self._filter_cache[cache_key] = filtered_data\n\n                # Ogranicz rozmiar cache'a\n                if len(self._filter_cache) > 10:\n                    # Usu\u0144 najstarszy wpis (zak\u0142adaj\u0105c, \u017ce ka\u017cdy nowy klucz jest dodawany na ko\u0144cu)\n                    oldest_key = next(iter(self._filter_cache))\n                    del self._filter_cache[oldest_key]\n\n            # Sprawd\u017a, czy liczba wierszy si\u0119 zmieni\u0142a\n            if len(filtered_data) != old_row_count:\n                # Wykonaj pe\u0142ny reset modelu\n                self.beginResetModel()\n                self._filtered_data = filtered_data\n                self.endResetModel()\n            else:\n                # Sprawd\u017a, czy zawarto\u015b\u0107 si\u0119 zmieni\u0142a\n                content_changed = False\n\n                # Tworzymy s\u0142ownik mapuj\u0105cy ID zdarze\u0144 na indeksy wierszy dla szybszego wyszukiwania\n                event_id_map = {e.get('id'): i for i, e in enumerate(self._filtered_data) if 'id' in e}\n\n                # Sprawd\u017a, kt\u00f3re zdarzenia si\u0119 zmieni\u0142y lub zosta\u0142y zast\u0105pione\n                changed_rows = set()\n                for i, new_event in enumerate(filtered_data):\n                    event_id = new_event.get('evt_id') # By\u0142o 'id'\n                    if event_id is not None and event_id in event_id_map:\n                        # Zdarzenie o tym ID ju\u017c istnieje\n                        old_idx = event_id_map[event_id]\n\n                        # Sprawd\u017a, czy dane zdarzenia si\u0119 zmieni\u0142y\n                        if new_event != self._filtered_data[old_idx]:\n                            changed_rows.add(old_idx)\n                            content_changed = True\n                    else:\n                        # Nowe zdarzenie lub zast\u0105pione zdarzenie\n                        content_changed = True\n                        break\n\n                if content_changed:\n                    # Zaktualizuj dane bez pe\u0142nego resetu modelu\n                    self._filtered_data = filtered_data\n\n                    # Emituj sygna\u0142y dla zmienionych wierszy\n                    for row in changed_rows:\n                        # Emituj sygna\u0142 zmiany danych dla ca\u0142ego wiersza\n                        left_index = self.index(row, 0)\n                        right_index = self.index(row, self.columnCount() - 1)\n                        self.dataChanged.emit(left_index, right_index)\n\n                    # Je\u015bli zmiana jest bardziej z\u0142o\u017cona, emituj sygna\u0142 zmiany uk\u0142adu\n                    if len(changed_rows) < len(filtered_data):\n                        self.layoutChanged.emit()\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d w filter_data: {e}\")\n            import traceback\n            traceback.print_exc()\n\n    def _generate_filter_cache_key(self, filter_params):\n        \"\"\"\n        Generuje klucz cache dla parametr\u00f3w filtrowania.\n\n        Args:\n            filter_params: S\u0142ownik parametr\u00f3w filtrowania\n\n        Returns:\n            str: Klucz cache\n        \"\"\"\n        # Sortuj klucze dla sp\u00f3jno\u015bci\n        sorted_keys = sorted(filter_params.keys())\n        key_parts = []\n\n        for key in sorted_keys:\n            value = filter_params[key]\n            if isinstance(value, list):\n                # Sortuj listy dla sp\u00f3jno\u015bci\n                value_str = \",\".join(sorted(value))\n                key_parts.append(f\"{key}=[{value_str}]\")\n            else:\n                key_parts.append(f\"{key}={value}\")\n\n        return \"|\".join(key_parts)\n\n    def _standardize_date(self, date_str):\n        \"\"\"\n        Standaryzuje format daty do 'YYYY-MM-DD' dla por\u00f3wna\u0144.\n\n        Args:\n            date_str: Data w dowolnym formacie\n\n        Returns:\n            str: Data w formacie 'YYYY-MM-DD'\n        \"\"\"\n        if not date_str:\n            return ''\n\n        # Obs\u0142uga r\u00f3\u017cnych format\u00f3w\n        if isinstance(date_str, str):\n            # Format 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss'\n            if 'T' in date_str:\n                return date_str.split('T')[0]\n\n            # Format 'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss'\n            if ' ' in date_str:\n                return date_str.split(' ')[0]\n\n            # Format 'YYYY-MM-DD'\n            if len(date_str) == 10 and date_str.count('-') == 2:\n                return date_str\n\n            # Format 'DD.MM.YYYY'\n            if len(date_str) == 10 and date_str.count('.') == 2:\n                parts = date_str.split('.')\n                if len(parts) == 3:\n                    return f\"{parts[2]}-{parts[1]}-{parts[0]}\"\n\n        return date_str\n\n    def get_event(self, row):\n        \"\"\"\n        Zwraca zdarzenie dla danego wiersza\n\n        Args:\n            row: Indeks wiersza\n\n        Returns:\n            dict: Dane zdarzenia lub None\n        \"\"\"\n        if 0 <= row < len(self._filtered_data): return self._filtered_data[row]\n        return None\n\n    def get_all_events(self):\n        \"\"\"Zwraca wszystkie zdarzenia\"\"\"\n        return self._data\n\n    def get_filtered_events(self):\n        \"\"\"Zwraca przefiltrowane zdarzenia\"\"\"\n        return self._filtered_data", "encoding": "utf-8"}, {"path": "export_settings_to_db.py", "content": "# export_settings_to_db.py\nimport json\nfrom collections import OrderedDict\nfrom db_connector import DatabaseConnector, SQL_OBJECTS\nfrom _version import __version__ as APP_VERSION\n\ndef get_config_as_json(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=4):\n    return json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=ensure_ascii, indent=indent)\n\ndef export_settings():\n    \"\"\"G\u0142\u00f3wna funkcja eksportuj\u0105ca wszystkie ustawienia aplikacji do bazy danych.\"\"\"\n\n    # Aplikowanie ustawie\u0144 SZTYWNYCH (Zawsze UPDATE/INSERT)\n        print(\"\\n[SYSTEM] Aktualizacja wymuszona (Core):\")\n        for key, value in settings_enforced.items():\n            sql = f\"\"\"\n                MERGE {table_name} AS target\n                USING (SELECT ? AS SettingKey, ? AS SettingValue) AS source\n                ON (target.SettingKey = source.SettingKey)\n                WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.SettingValue = source.SettingValue\n                WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SettingKey, SettingValue) VALUES (source.SettingKey, source.SettingValue);\n                \"\"\"\n            cursor.execute(sql, (key, value))\n            print(f\" -> Zaktualizowano: {key}\")\n\n        # B.    def _apply_filter_visibility_and_order(self):\n        \"\"\"Przebudowuje layout filtr\u00f3w.\"\"\"\n        layout = self.main_window.filters_layout\n        widget_map = usuni\u0119te.\n        \"\"\"\n        debug_print(\"[Filtracja] Rozpocz\u0119to synchronizacj\u0119 widget\u00f3w filtr\u00f3w niestandardowych (Controller)...\")\n\n        current_col_ids =
