Liczba kolumn: {self._column_count}\")\n\n    def data(self, index, role=Qt.DisplayRole):\n        if not index.isValid(): return None\n        row, col = index.row(), index.column()\n        if not (0 <= row < self._row_count and 0 <= col < self._column_count and row < len(self._keys)): return None\n\n        key = self._keys[row]\n        row_data = self._processed_data.get(key, {})\n        is_employee_column = col < len(self._visible_columns)\n\n        day_data = {}\n        if not is_employee_column:\n            schedule_col_check = col - len(self._visible_columns)\n            if schedule_col_check < 31:\n                day = schedule_col_check + 1\n                day_data = row_data.get('days', {}).get(day, {})\n\n        # --- ForegroundRole (Czcionka) ---\n        if role == Qt.ForegroundRole:\n            if not is_employee_column:\n                bg_color_hex = day_data.get('_bg_color_hex')\n                if bg_color_hex:\n                    color = QColor(bg_color_hex)\n                    luminance = 0.299 * color.red() + 0.587 * color.green() + 0.114 * color.blue()\n                    return QBrush(QColor(Qt.GlobalColor.white if luminance < 128 else Qt.GlobalColor.black))\n                elif day_data.get('symbol'):\n                    return QBrush(QColor(Qt.GlobalColor.white if self._is_dark_theme else Qt.GlobalColor.black))\n\n            if is_employee_column:\n                user_id = str(key[3])\n                if user_id in self._row_colors:\n                    return QBrush(QColor(Qt.GlobalColor.black if not self._is_dark_theme else Qt.GlobalColor.white))\n            return None\n\n        # --- Pozosta\u0142e role ---\n        if role == ROLE_SPECIAL_SYMBOL: return parse_symbol(day_data.get('symbol', '')).get(\n            'special_symbol') if day_data.get('symbol') else None\n        if role == ROLE_LOCATION_SYMBOL: return parse_symbol(day_data.get('symbol', '')).get(\n            'location') if day_data.get('symbol') else None\n        if role == ROLE_IS_SUGGESTED_OFF: return day_data.get('is_suggested_off', False)\n\n        # --- DisplayRole (Tekst) ---\n        if role == Qt.DisplayRole:\n            if is_employee_column:\n                col_id = self._visible_columns[col]\n                if col_id.startswith(\"custom_\"):\n                    user_id = str(key[3])\n                    storage_key = f\"{user_id}|{self._year}|{self._month}\"\n                    return self._custom_columns.get(col_id, {}).get('values', {}).get(storage_key, \"\")\n                else:\n                    # Mapowanie specjalne dla kluczy z krotki (tuple)\n                    if col_id == 'sched_wydzial':\n                        return key[0] or \"\"\n                    elif col_id == 'sched_przelozony_nazwisko':\n                        return row_data.get('sched_przelozony_nazwisko', '')  # Tu pobieramy ze s\u0142ownika\n                    elif col_id == 'sched_user_display':\n                        return key[2] or \"\"\n                    elif col_id == 'sched_korekta':\n                        val = row_data.get(col_id)\n                        try:\n                            # Konwertujemy na float, a potem na int (usuwa .0)\n                            if val is not None and str(val).strip() != \"\":\n                                return str(int(float(val)))\n                            return \"\"  # Lub \"0\", zale\u017cnie od preferencji\n                        except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                            return str(val)\n                    else:\n                        # Dla reszty po prostu pobierz warto\u015b\u0107 ze s\u0142ownika u\u017cywaj\u0105c col_id\n                        return str(row_data.get(col_id, ''))\n            else:\n                schedule_col = col - len(self._visible_columns)\n\n                # 1. Dni (0..30)\n                if schedule_col < 31:\n                    return day_data.get('_display_value', \"\")\n\n                # 2. Suma (31)\n                elif schedule_col == 31:\n                    return str(row_data.get('total_hours', 0))\n\n                # 3. Bilans (32) - U\u017cywamy cache\n                elif schedule_col == 32:\n                    val = row_data.get('_cache_balance', 0)\n                    return str(val)\n\n                # 4. Dynamiczne kolumny\n                current_check_idx = 33\n\n                # Procent rano - U\u017cywamy cache\n                if self._show_percent_morning_column:\n                    if schedule_col == current_check_idx:\n                        return row_data.get('_cache_percent_morning', \"0%\")\n                    current_check_idx += 1\n\n                # Procent HO - U\u017cywamy cache\n                if self._show_percent_ho_column:\n                    if schedule_col == current_check_idx:\n                        return row_data.get('_cache_percent_ho', \"0%\")\n                    current_check_idx += 1\n\n                # Komentarz\n                if self._show_comment_column:\n                    if schedule_col == current_check_idx:\n                        return row_data.get('sched_komentarz', '')\n\n            return \"\"\n\n        # --- BackgroundRole (T\u0142o) ---\n        if role == Qt.BackgroundRole:\n            if is_employee_column:\n                user_id = str(key[3])\n                if user_id in self._row_colors:\n                    base_hex = self._row_colors[user_id]\n                    pal = ROW_COLORS_DARK_THEME if self._is_dark_theme else ROW_COLORS_LIGHT_THEME\n                    final = pal.get(base_hex)\n                    if final: return QBrush(QColor(final))\n\n            if not is_employee_column:\n                schedule_col = col - len(self._visible_columns)\n\n                # Kolorowanie dla dni (0..30)\n                if schedule_col < 31:\n                    if day_data.get('is_suggested_off', False): return QBrush(QColor(\"#006400\"))\n\n                    bg_hex = day_data.get('_bg_color_hex')\n                    if bg_hex:\n                        return QBrush(QColor(bg_hex))\n                    if day_data.get('symbol'):\n                        return QBrush(QColor(65, 65, 65) if self._is_dark_theme else QColor(225, 225, 225))\n\n                # --- PRZYWR\u00d3CONE KOLOROWANIE DLA KOLUMN OBLICZENIOWYCH ---\n\n                # 1. Suma RBH (zawsze na indeksie 31)\n                elif schedule_col == 31:\n                    # Mo\u017cesz tu przywr\u00f3ci\u0107 logik\u0119 kolorowania sumy, je\u015bli by\u0142a (np. przekroczenia)\n                    # Obecnie standardowe t\u0142o (lub brak, co daje domy\u015blne)\n                    return None\n\n                    # 2. Bilans RBH (zawsze na indeksie 32)\n                elif schedule_col == 32:\n                    try:\n                        etat = float(row_data.get('sched_etat', 0) or 0)\n                        total = float(row_data.get('total_hours', 0) or 0)\n                        wd = self._working_days if hasattr(self, '_working_days') and self._working_days > 0 else 0\n                        balance = total - (etat * wd)\n\n                        # Logika kolorowania bilansu:\n                        if balance > 0:\n                            # Niedob\u00f3r godzin (czerwony/r\u00f3\u017cowy)\n                            return QBrush(QColor(\"#662222\") if self._is_dark_theme else QColor(\"#ffcccc\"))\n                        elif balance < 0:\n                            # Nadgodziny w bilansie (zielony)\n                            return QBrush(QColor(\"#225522\") if self._is_dark_theme else QColor(\"#ccffcc\"))\n                        else:\n                            # Idealnie (szary/przezroczysty)\n                            return None\n                    except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                        return None\n\n                # --- KOLOROWANIA HO ---\n                # Musimy ustali\u0107 indeks kolumny HO dynamicznie, tak jak w DisplayRole\n                current_check_idx = 33\n\n                # Procent rano\n                if self._show_percent_morning_column:\n                    current_check_idx += 1  # Pomi\u0144, to nie HO\n\n                # Procent HO\n                if self._show_percent_ho_column:\n                    if schedule_col == current_check_idx:\n                        # Pobierz warto\u015b\u0107 liczbow\u0105 (float) z cache'a sortowania\n                        ho_val = row_data.get('_cache_sort_percent_ho', 0.0)\n\n                        # Definicja kolor\u00f3w\n                        green_bg = QColor(\"#225522\") if self._is_dark_theme else QColor(\"#ccffcc\")\n                        orange_bg = QColor(\"#8a5a00\") if self._is_dark_theme else QColor(\n                            \"#ffe0b2\")  # Pomara\u0144czowy\n                        red_bg = QColor(\"#662222\") if self._is_dark_theme else QColor(\"#ffcccc\")\n\n                        if ho_val >= 60.0:\n                            return QBrush(red_bg)\n                        else:\n                            return QBrush(green_bg)\n\n                    current_check_idx += 1\n\n        if role == Qt.ToolTipRole: return get_symbol_description(day_data.get('symbol', '')) if day_data.get(\n            'symbol') else None\n        if role == ROLE_DATA: return self._get_user_data(row_data, key, col, is_employee_column)\n        if role == ROLE_HAS_MEETING: return self._get_dynamic_meeting_icon(key, col, is_employee_column)\n        if role == ROLE_HAS_OVERTIME: return self._get_dynamic_overtime_icon(key, col, is_employee_column)\n        if role == Qt.TextAlignmentRole:\n            if is_employee_column: return Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter\n            schedule_col = col - len(self._visible_columns)\n            if schedule_col >= 31:\n                base_idx = 33\n                if self._show_percent_morning_column: base_idx += 1\n                if self._show_percent_ho_column: base_idx += 1  # Dodatkowe przesuni\u0119cie dla HO\n                \n                # Komentarz jest ostatni\u0105 kolumn\u0105 dynamiczn\u0105\n                if self._show_comment_column and schedule_col == base_idx:\n                    return Qt.AlignLeft | Qt.AlignVCenter\n                return Qt.AlignCenter\n            return Qt.AlignBottom | Qt.AlignHCenter\n\n        return None\n\n    def _calculate_ho_percentage_display(self, row_data):\n        \"\"\"Zwraca sformatowany string (np. '50%') udzia\u0142u pracy zdalnej.\"\"\"\n        val = self._calculate_ho_percentage_value(row_data)\n        return f\"{int(val)}%\"\n\n    def _calculate_ho_percentage_value(self, row_data):\n        \"\"\"\n        Oblicza warto\u015b\u0107 liczbow\u0105 udzia\u0142u HO (0-100) w trybie \u015aCIS\u0141YM.\n        Zalicza dzie\u0144 jako HO tylko wtedy, gdy symbol jawnie zawiera lokalizacj\u0119 'h'.\n        Ignoruje domy\u015bln\u0105 lokalizacj\u0119 pracownika.\n        \"\"\"\n        ho_shifts = 0\n        total_working_shifts = 0\n\n        for day in range(1, 32):\n            day_data = row_data.get('days', {}).get(day, {})\n            symbol = day_data.get('symbol', '')\n            if not symbol: continue\n\n            parsed = parse_symbol(symbol)\n            # Je\u015bli to absencja (nie b\u0119d\u0105ca 'pracuj\u0105ca' jak np. DYS), pomijamy\n            if parsed.get('special_symbol') and parsed.get(\n                    'special_symbol').upper() not in app_settings.WORK_LIKE_SYMBOLS:\n                continue\n\n            start_hour = parsed.get('start_hour')\n\n            # Je\u015bli dzie\u0144 jest dniem pracuj\u0105cym (ma godzin\u0119 startu)\n            if start_hour is not None:\n                total_working_shifts += 1\n\n                # --- ZMIANA: Tryb \u015bcis\u0142y (Strict Mode) ---\n                location = parsed.get('location')\n\n                # Zliczamy tylko jawne 'h'.\n                # Zwyk\u0142e '8;8' (nawet przy domy\u015blnym HO) nie b\u0119dzie liczone jako HO.\n                if location == 'h':\n                    ho_shifts += 1\n\n        if total_working_shifts == 0: return 0.0\n        return (ho_shifts / total_working_shifts) * 100.0\n\n    def _calculate_morning_percentage_display(self, row_data):\n        \"\"\"Oblicza procent zmian porannych (start 0-13) wzgl\u0119dem wszystkich zmian roboczych.\"\"\"\n        morning_shifts = 0\n        total_working_shifts = 0\n\n        for day in range(1, 32):\n            day_data = row_data.get('days', {}).get(day, {})\n            symbol = day_data.get('symbol', '')\n            if not symbol: continue\n\n            parsed = parse_symbol(symbol)\n            if parsed.get('special_symbol'): continue\n\n            start_hour = parsed.get('start_hour')\n            if start_hour is not None:\n                total_working_shifts += 1\n                if 0 <= start_hour <= 13:\n                    morning_shifts += 1\n\n        if total_working_shifts == 0: return \"0%\"\n        val = int((morning_shifts / total_working_shifts) * 100)\n        return f\"{val}%\"\n\n    def _calculate_morning_percentage_value(self, row_data):\n        \"\"\"Wersja zwracaj\u0105ca float do sortowania.\"\"\"\n        morning_shifts = 0\n        total_working_shifts = 0\n        for day in range(1, 32):\n            day_data = row_data.get('days', {}).get(day, {})\n            symbol = day_data.get('symbol', '')\n            if not symbol: continue\n            parsed = parse_symbol(symbol)\n            if parsed.get('special_symbol'): continue\n            start_hour = parsed.get('start_hour')\n            if start_hour is not None:\n                total_working_shifts += 1\n                if 0 <= start_hour <= 13:\n                    morning_shifts += 1\n\n        if total_working_shifts == 0: return 0.0\n        return (morning_shifts / total_working_shifts) * 100.0\n\n    def _get_sort_key(self, key, col_id):\n        row_data = self._processed_data.get(key, {})\n\n        if col_id == 'percent_morning':\n            return row_data.get('_cache_sort_percent_morning', 0.0)\n\n        if col_id == 'percent_ho':\n            return row_data.get('_cache_sort_percent_ho', 0.0)\n\n        if col_id.startswith(\"custom_\"):\n            user_id = str(key[3])\n            if hasattr(self, '_custom_columns') and self._custom_columns:\n                storage_key = f\"{user_id}|{self._year}|{self._month}\"\n                value = self._custom_columns.get(col_id, {}).get('values', {}).get(storage_key, \"\")\n                try:\n                    return float(value)\n                except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                    return str(value).lower()\n            else:\n                return \"\"\n\n        # Mapowanie dla kluczy z krotki\n        if col_id == 'sched_wydzial': return key[0] or \"\"\n        if col_id == 'sched_przelozony': return key[1] or \"\"\n        if col_id == 'sched_user_display': return key[2] or \"\"\n        if col_id == 'sched_user_id': return int(key[3] or 0)\n\n        value = row_data.get(col_id, '')\n\n        # Lista kolumn liczbowych (zaktualizowane klucze)\n        if col_id in ['sched_etat', 'sched_dtn', 'sched_korekta']:\n            return float(value or 0)\n\n        if col_id == 'total_hours':\n            return float(row_data.get('total_hours', 0) or 0)\n\n        if col_id == 'balance_hours':\n            try:\n                etat = float(row_data.get('sched_etat', 0) or 0)\n                total_hours = float(row_data.get('total_hours', 0) or 0)\n                working_days = self._working_days if hasattr(self, '_working_days') and self._working_days > 0 else 0\n                balance = (etat * working_days) - total_hours\n                return balance\n            except (ValueError, TypeError):\n                return 0.0\n\n        if col_id == 'komentarz_grafik':\n            return str(row_data.get('komentarz_grafik', ''))\n\n        return str(value)\n\n\n\n\n    def sort_by_column_id(self, col_id: str, order:                    self._employee_columns[:3]]\n        if self._year is not None: self._update_column_structure()", "encoding": "utf-8"}, {"path": "session_manager.py", "content": "# session_manager.py\n# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-\n\nfrom db_connector import DatabaseConnector\nfrom debug_utils import log_error, debug_print\nfrom config import SQL_OBJECTS  # Dodano import obiekt\u00f3w SQL z pliku konfiguracyjnego\nfrom _version import __version__ as APP_VERSION\nfrom typing import Optional\n\n\nclass SessionManager:\n    \"\"\"\n    Mened\u017cer sesji u\u017cytkownika aplikacji.\n\n    Odpowiada za rejestrowanie rozpocz\u0119cia sesji, wysy\u0142anie sygna\u0142\u00f3w \u017cycia (heartbeat)\n    oraz bezpieczne zamykanie sesji w bazie danych.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, user_login: str):\n        \"\"\"\n        Inicjalizuje mened\u017cera sesji.\n\n        Args:\n            user_login (str): Login u\u017cytkownika systemu Windows/Aplikacji.\n        \"\"\"\n        self.user_login = user_login\n        self.session_id: Optional[int] = None\n\n        # Pobieramy nazw\u0119 tabeli z konfigu, z fallbackiem na 'AppSessions' w razie b\u0142\u0119du konfiguracji\n        self.table_name = SQL_OBJECTS.get('appsessions', 'AppSessions')\n\n    def start_session(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Rejestruje now\u0105 sesj\u0119 w bazie danych przy starcie aplikacji.\n        Ustawia self.session_id na podstawie zwr\u00f3conego ID z bazy.\n        \n        Dodatkowo oznacza \"martwe\" sesje tego u\u017cytkownika (zamkni\u0119te przez Mened\u017cera Zada\u0144\n        lub crash bez logowania) jako 'KilledOrCrash'.\n        \"\"\"\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = DatabaseConnector.get_connection()\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n            # KROK 1: Oznacz \"martwe\" sesje tego u\u017cytkownika\n            # Sesja jest \"martwa\" je\u015bli:\n            # - Nie ma SessionEnd (nie zosta\u0142a poprawnie zamkni\u0119ta)\n            # - LastHeartbeat by\u0142 ponad 10 minut temu\n            sql_cleanup = f\"\"\"\n                UPDATE {self.table_name} \n                SET SessionEnd = GETDATE(), ExitType = 'KilledOrCrash'\n                WHERE LoginWindows = ? \n                  AND SessionEnd IS NULL \n                  AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, LastHeartbeat, GETDATE()) > 10\n            \"\"\"\n            cursor.execute(sql_cleanup, (self.user_login,))\n            dead_sessions_count = cursor.rowcount\n            if dead_sessions_count > 0:\n                debug_print(f\"SessionManager: Oznaczono {dead_sessions_count} martwych sesji jako 'KilledOrCrash'\")\n\n            # KROK 2: Utw\u00f3rz now\u0105 sesj\u0119\n            sql = f\"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO {self.table_name} (LoginWindows, AppVersion, SessionStart, LastHeartbeat)\n                OUTPUT INSERTED.SessionId\n                VALUES (?, ?, GETDATE(), GETDATE())\n            \"\"\"\n\n            cursor.execute(sql, (self.user_login, APP_VERSION))\n            row = cursor.fetchone()\n\n            if row:\n                self.session_id = row[0]\n                debug_print(f\"SessionManager: Rozpocz\u0119to sesj\u0119 ID: {self.session_id} dla {self.user_login}\")\n            else:\n                debug_print(\"SessionManager: Nie uda\u0142o si\u0119 pobra\u0107 ID nowej sesji.\")\n\n            conn.commit()\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d startu sesji (SessionManager): {e}\", exception=e)\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def send_heartbeat(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Aktualizuje czas ostatniej aktywno\u015bci (LastHeartbeat) dla bie\u017c\u0105cej sesji.\n        Powinno by\u0107 uruchamiane cyklicznie (np. co 5 minut) przez QTimer w g\u0142\u00f3wnym w\u0105tku.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not self.session_id:\n            return\n\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = DatabaseConnector.get_connection()\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n            sql = f\"UPDATE {self.table_name} SET LastHeartbeat = GETDATE() WHERE SessionId = ?\"\n            cursor.execute(sql, (self.session_id,))\n\n            conn.commit()\n            # debug_print(f\"SessionManager: Heartbeat wys\u0142any dla sesji {self.session_id}\")\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            # Cichy b\u0142\u0105d heartbeat'u nie jest krytyczny, ale warto go odnotowa\u0107 w debugu\n            # U\u017cywamy debug_print zamiast log_error, aby nie za\u015bmieca\u0107 log\u00f3w produkcyjnych przy chwilowych problemach z sieci\u0105\n            debug_print(f\"SessionManager: B\u0142\u0105d wysy\u0142ania heartbeat: {e}\")\n        finally:\n            if conn:\n                conn.close()\n\n    def end_session(self, exit_type: str = \"Normal\", crash_info: Optional[str] = None) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Zamyka sesj\u0119 w bazie danych, ustawiaj\u0105c czas zako\u0144czenia i typ wyj\u015bcia.\n\n        Args:\n            exit_type (str): Typ zamkni\u0119cia ('Normal', 'UserExit', 'RemoteKill', 'Error', 'Crash', 'UnexpectedExit').\n            crash_info (str, optional): Szczeg\u00f3\u0142y b\u0142\u0119du/crashu (traceback). Max 4000 znak\u00f3w.\n        \"\"\"\n        if not self.session_id:\n            return\n\n        conn = None\n        try:\n            conn = DatabaseConnector.get_connection()\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n            # Podstawowe UPDATE - zawsze dzia\u0142a\n            sql = f\"UPDATE {self.table_name} SET SessionEnd = GETDATE(), ExitType = ? WHERE SessionId = ?\"\n            cursor.execute(sql, (exit_type, self.session_id))\n\n            # Pr\u00f3ba zapisu crash_info (je\u015bli kolumna istnieje)\n            if crash_info:\n                try:\n                    sql_crash = f\"UPDATE {self.table_name} SET CrashInfo = ? WHERE SessionId = ?\"\n                    cursor.execute(sql_crash, (crash_info[:4000], self.session_id))\n                except Exception as crash_err:\n                    # Kolumna CrashInfo mo\u017ce nie istnie\u0107 - to OK, logujemy ostrze\u017cenie\n                    debug_print(f\"SessionManager: Nie uda\u0142o si\u0119 zapisa\u0107 CrashInfo (kolumna mo\u017ce nie istnie\u0107): {crash_err}\")\n\n            conn.commit()\n            debug_print(f\"SessionManager: Sesja {self.session_id} zako\u0144czona (Typ: {exit_type}).\")\n\n        except Exception as e:\n Migracja column_widths\n        if 'column_widths' in settings:\n            new_widths = {}\n            for col, width in settings['column_widths'].items():\n                if col.startswith('custom_') or col.startswith('sched_'):\n                    new_widths[col] = width\n                elif col in migration_map:\n                    new_widths[migration_map[col]] = width\n                else:\n                    new_widths[col] = width\n            settings['column_widths'] = new_widths\n\n        # 3. self.light_mode_btn.setChecked(False)\n        else:\n            self.light_mode_btn.setChecked(True)\n            self.dark_mode_btn.setChecked(False)\n\n        active_profile_name = self.grupa_combo.findData(self.current_settings.get('import_grupa', 3))\n        if index_g != -1: self.grupa_combo.setCurrentIndex(index_g)\n        index_f = self.show_special_symbol_check.setChecked(self.current_settings.get('show_special_symbol', True))\n        self.show_location_symbol_check.setChecked(self.current_settings.get('show_location_symbol', True))\n        special_pos = self.current_settings.get('special_symbol_position', 'top_left')\n        self.special_symbol_pos_combo.setCurrentIndex(1 if special_pos == 'top_right' else 0)\n        location_pos = self.current_settings.get('location_symbol_position', 'top_right')\n        self.location_symbol_pos_combo.setCurrentIndex(1 if location_pos == 'top_right' else 0)\n\n    def _refresh_profile_combo(self, select_name=None):\n        self.profile_combo.blockSignals(True)\n        self.profile_combo.clear()\n        for name in sorted(self.profiles.keys()):\n            self.profile_combo.addItem(name)\n\n        if select_name and select_name in self.profiles:\n            self.profile_combo.setCurrentText(select_name)\n\n        self.profile_combo.blockSignals(False)\n        # R\u0119cznie wywo\u0142ujemy \u0142adowanie danych, bo sygna\u0142 jeszcze nie dzia\u0142a (lub jest zablokowany)\n        self._on_profile_changed()\n\n    def _on_profile_changed(self):\n        \"\"\"\u0141aduje dane z wybranego profilu do kontrolek.\"\"\"\n        name = self.profile_combo.currentText()\n        data = self.profiles.get(name, {})\n\n        self.delete_profile_btn.setEnabled(name != \"Podstawowy\")\n\n        # Blokujemy sygna\u0142y na czas ustawiania warto\u015bci\n        self._block_params_signals(True)\n        try:\n            self.font_combo.setCurrentFont(QFont(data.get('font_family', 'Segoe UI')))\n            self.font_size_spin.setValue(int(data.get('font_size', 9)))\n            self.row_height_spin.setValue(int(data.get('row_height', 25)))\n            self.staffing_row_height_spin.setValue(int(data.get('staffing_row_height', 22)))\n            self.header_height_spin.setValue(int(data.get('header_height', 35)))\n            self.day_width_spin.setValue(int(data.get('day_col_width', 45)))\n        finally:\n            self._block_params_signals(False)\n\n        # Podgl\u0105d wywo\u0142ujemy tylko, je\u015bli sygna\u0142y s\u0105 ju\u017c pod\u0142\u0105czone (czyli po inicjalizacji)\n        # W trakcie startu connect_signals jeszcze nie posz\u0142o, wi\u0119c to nic nie zrobi, co jest OK.\n        self._emit_live_preview_changes()\n\n    def _block_params_signals(self, block: bool):\n        self.font_combo.blockSignals(block)\n        self.font_size_spin.blockSignals(block)\n value = 0.0\n        if row < len(self._data) and col < len(self._data[row]):\n            value = self._data[row][col] or 0.0\n\n        if role == Qt.DisplayRole:\n            return str(int(round(value))) if value != 0 else \"\"\n        if role == Qt.TextAlignmentRole: return Qt.AlignCenter\n\n        # --- POPRAWIONA LOGIKA KOLOROWANIA ---\n        # Obliczamy procent raz, aby u\u017cy\u0107 go dla t\u0142a i czcionki\n        percentage = (value / self._max_value) * 100 if self._max_value > 0 else 0\n\n        if role == Qt.BackgroundRole and value > 0:\n            # Zastosowano gradient zieleni.\n            # Zmieniono pierwszy warunek, aby zwraca\u0142 bardzo jasny zielony zamiast None.\n            if percentage < 14:\n                # Do 14% - Bardzo jasny zielony (zamiast bia\u0142ego)\n                return QBrush(QColor(\"#CCFFCC\"))\n            elif percentage < 32:\n                return QBrush(QColor(\"#00FF00\"))  # Jasny zielony (LightGreen)\n            elif percentage < 57:\n                return QBrush(QColor(\"#00C000\"))  # \u015aredni zielony (LimeGreen)\n            elif percentage < 90:\n                return QBrush(QColor(\"#008000\"))  # Ciemny zielony (Green)\n            else:\n                # Powy\u017cej 90%\n                return QBrush(QColor(\"#003300\"))  # Bardzo ciemny zielony\n        # --- KONIEC POPRAWIONEJ LOGIKI ---\n\n        # --- ZMIANA: Kolor czcionki zale\u017cny od procentu ---\n        if role == Qt.ForegroundRole and value > 0:\n            # Warunek: czarny dla warto\u015bci < 90%, bia\u0142y dla reszty (>= 90%)\n            if percentage < 90:\n                return QBrush(QColor(Qt.GlobalColor.black))\n            else:\n                return ForecastComparisonTableModel(BaseMatrixTableModel):\n    def __init__(self, year, month, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(year, month, \"Godzina\", parent)\n        self._view_mode, self._forecast_data, self._actual_data = \"forecast\", [], []\n        self._max_abs_diff, self._max_value = 1.0, 1.0\n\n    def rowCount(self, parent=None):\n        return 24 + 1\n\n    def columnCount(self, parent=None):\n        return self._days_in_month\n\n    def data(self, index, role=Qt.DisplayRole):\n        if not index.isValid(): return None\n        row, col = index.row(), index.column()\n\n        is_total_row = (row == 24)\n        if is_total_row:\n            if 0 <= col < self._days_in_month:\n                forecast_total = sum(self._forecast_data[h][col] for h in range(24) if\n                                     h < len(self._forecast_data) and col < len(self._forecast_data[h]))\n                actual_total = sum(self._actual_data[h][col] for h in range(24) if\n                                   h < len(self._actual_data) and col < len(self._actual_data[h]))\n\n                if role == Qt.DisplayRole:\n                    val = 0\n                    if self._view_mode == \"coverage\":\n                        val = (actual_total / forecast_total * 100) if forecast_total > 0 else 0\n                        return f\"{val:.0f}%\" if actual_total > 0 or forecast_total > 0 else \"\"\n                    elif self._view_mode == \"forecast\":\n                        val = forecast_total\n                    elif self._view_mode == \"actual\":\n                        val = actual_total\n                    elif self._view_mode == \"diff\":\n                        val = actual_total - forecast_total\n                    return str(int(round(val))) if val != 0 else \"\"\n\n            return self._get_total_row_style(role)\n\n        forecast_val = self._forecast_data[row][col] if row < len(self._forecast_data) and col < len(\n            self._forecast_data[row]) else 0\n        actual_val = self._actual_data[row][col] if row < len(self._actual_data) and col < len(\n            self._actual_data[row]) else 0\n\n        if role == Qt.DisplayRole:\n            if self._view_mode == \"coverage\":\n                val_to_show = (actual_val / forecast_val * 100) if forecast_val > 0 else 0\n                return f\"{val_to_show:.0f}%\" if actual_val > 0 or forecast_val > 0 else \"\"\n\n            val_to_show = 0\n            if self._view_mode == \"forecast\":\n                val_to_show = forecast_val\n            elif self._view_mode == \"actual\":\n                val_to_show = actual_val\n            elif self._view_mode == \"diff\":\n                val_to_show = actual_val - forecast_val\n            return str(int(round(val_to_show))) if val_to_show != 0 else \"\"\n\n        if role == Qt.BackgroundRole:\n            if self._view_mode == \"coverage\":\n                coverage = (actual_val / forecast_val * 100) if forecast_val > 0 else 0\n                if actual_val == 0 and forecast_val == 0: return None\n                if coverage < 90:\n                    return QBrush(QColor(255, 220, 220) if not self._is_dark_theme else QColor(100, 40, 40))\n                elif coverage > 110:\n                    return QBrush(QColor(255, 255, 210) if not self._is_dark_theme else QColor(100, 100, 40))\n                else:\n                    return QBrush(QColor(220, 255, 220) if not self._is_dark_theme else QColor(40, 80, 40))\n            if self._view_mode == \"diff\":\n                diff = actual_val - forecast_val\n                if diff != 0:\n                    factor = min(abs(diff) / self._max_abs_diff, 1.0) if self._max_abs_diff > 0 else 0\n                    start_color, end_color = (QColor(255, 230, 230), QColor(200, 0, 0)) if diff < 0 else (\n                        QColor(230, 255, 230), QColor(0, 128, 0))\n                    if self._is_dark_theme: start_color, end_color = (\n                        QColor(80, 50, 50), QColor(180, 40, 40)) if diff < 0 else (\n                        QColor(40, 80, 40), QColor(100, 200, 100))\n                    r, g, b = [int(s + (e - s) * factor) for s, e in zip(start_color.getRgb(), end_color.getRgb())][:3]\n                    return QBrush(QColor(r, g, b))\n            elif self._view_mode in [\"forecast\", \"actual\"]:\n                value = forecast_val if self._view_mode == \"forecast\" else actual_val\n                if value > 0:\n                    factor = min(value / self._max_value, 1.0) if self._max_value > 0 else 0\n                    start_color, end_color = (\n                        QColor(235, 245, 255), QColor(60, 120, 180)) if not self._is_dark_theme else (\n                        QColor(40, 70, 90), QColor(90, 160, 230))\n                    r, g, b = [int(s + (e - s) * factor) for s, e in zip(start_color.getRgb(), end_color.getRgb())][:3]\n                    return QBrush(QColor(r, g, b))\n\n        if role == Qt.TextAlignmentRole: return Qt.AlignCenter\n        return None\n\n    def headerData(self, section, return QBrush(QColor(\"#FB7185\") if self._is_dark_theme else QColor(\"#E11D48\"))\n                return QBrush(QColor(AppStyles.DARK_TEXT_PRIMARY if self._is_dark_theme else [f\"{h:02d}:00\" for h in range(24)]\n        max_f = max((max(r, default=0) for r in self._forecast_data if r), default=0)\n        max_a = max((max(r, default=0) for r in self._actual_data if r), range(self._days_in_month) if r < len(self._actual_data) and c < len(self._actual_data[r])),\n                       default=1.0)\n        self._max_abs_diff = max_diff if max_diff > 0 else 1.0\n self._headers = []\n        self._breadcrumbs = [] # \u015acie\u017cka nawigacji, np. ['Wydzia\u0142', 'Prze\u0142o\u017cony']\n\n    def rowCount(self, parent=None):\n        return len(self._data)\n\n    def columnCount(self, parent=None):\n        return len(self._headers)\n\n    def headerData(self, section, orientation, role=Qt.DisplayRole):\n        if role == Qt.DisplayRole and orientation == Qt.Horizontal:\n            return self._headers[section]\n\n    def data(self, index, role=Qt.DisplayRole):\n        if not index.isValid() or role != Qt.DisplayRole:\n            return None\n        value = self._data[index.row()][index.column()]\n        if isinstance(value, float):\n            # Kolumna z procentami\n            if \"%\" in self._headers[index.column()]:\n                return f\"{value:.1f}%\"\n            # Kolumna z godzinami\n            return f\"{value:.1f}\"\n        return value\n\n    def update_data(self, department_data):\n        \"\"\"G\u0142\u00f3wna metoda do za\u0142adowania nowych, w pe\u0142ni przetworzonych danych.\"\"\"\n        self._all_data = department_data\n        self.display_departments()\n\n    def display_departments(self):\n        \"\"\"Ustawia widok na najwy\u017cszy poziom - grupowanie po wydzia\u0142ach.\"\"\"\n        self.beginResetModel()\n        self._breadcrumbs = []\n        self._headers = [\"Wydzia\u0142\", \"Suma godzin absencji\", \"Wska\u017anik absencji (%)\"]\n\n        # Sortowanie wydzia\u0142\u00f3w po sumie godzin absencji\n        sorted_depts = sorted(self._all_data.items(), key=lambda item: item[1]['total_hours'], reverse=True)\n\n        self._data = [[dept, data['total_hours'], data.get('rate', 0.0)] for dept, data in sorted_depts]\n        self.endResetModel()\n\n    def display_supervisors(self, department_name: str):\n        \"\"\"Ustawia widok na drugi poziom - prze\u0142o\u017ceni w ramach wydzia\u0142u.\"\"\"\n        if department_name not in self._all_data:\n            return\n        self.beginResetModel()\n        self._breadcrumbs = [department_name]\n        self._headers = [\"Prze\u0142o\u017cony\", \"Suma godzin absencji\", \"% Udzia\u0142u w wydz.\"]\n\n        dept_total = self._all_data[department_name].get('total_hours', 1.0)\n        supervisors_data = self._all_data[department_name].get('supervisors', {})\n\n        # Sortowanie prze\u0142o\u017conych po sumie godzin\n        sorted_supervisors = sorted(supervisors_data.items(), key=lambda item: item[1]['total_hours'], reverse=True)\n\n        self._data = [\n            [name, data['total_hours'], (data['total_hours'] / dept_total * 100.0) if dept_total > 0 else 0]\n            for name, data in sorted_supervisors\n        ]\n        self.endResetModel()\n\n    def display_employees(self, department_name: str, supervisor_name: str):\n        \"\"\"Ustawia widok na najni\u017cszy poziom - pracownicy w ramach prze\u0142o\u017conego.\"\"\"\n        if department_name not in self._all_data or supervisor_name not in self._all_data[department_name].get(\n                'supervisors', {}):\n            return\n        self.beginResetModel()\n        self._breadcrumbs = [department_name, supervisor_name]\n        self._headers = [\"Pracownik\", \"Suma godzin absencji\", \"% Udzia\u0142u u prze\u0142.\"]\n\n        supervisor_total = self._all_data[department_name]['supervisors'][supervisor_name].get('total_hours', 1.0)\n        employee_data = self._all_data[department_name]['supervisors'][supervisor_name].get('employees', {})\n\n        # Sortowanie pracownik\u00f3w po sumie godzin\n        sorted_employees = sorted(employee_data.items(), key=lambda item: item[1], reverse=True)\n\n        self._data = [\n            [name, hours, (hours / supervisor_total * 100.0) if supervisor_total > 0 else 0]\n            for name, hours in sorted_employees\n        ]\n        self.endResetModel()\n\n    def get_current_level(self) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Zwraca aktualny poziom zag\u0142\u0119bienia.\"\"\"\n        if not self._breadcrumbs:\n            return \"departments\"\n        if len(self._breadcrumbs) == 1:\n            return \"supervisors\"\n        if len(self._breadcrumbs) == 2:\n            return \"employees\"\n        return \"\"\n\n    def get_clicked_item_name(self, row: int) -> str | None:\n        \"\"\"Zwraca nazw\u0119 (wydzia\u0142u, prze\u0142o\u017conego) z klikni\u0119tego wiersza.\"\"\"\n        if 0 <= row < len(self._data):\n            return self._data[row][0]\n        return None\n\n    def get_breadcrumbs(self) -> list:\n        return self._breadcrumbs\n\nclass StaffingDetailsWindow(QDialog):\n    \"\"\"\n    Okno dialogowe do wy\u015bwietlania szczeg\u00f3\u0142\u00f3w obsady i analiz.\n    Wersja przepisana na PySide6.QtCharts, bez zale\u017cno\u015bci od Matplotlib i Numpy.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, parent, data_provider, year, month, grupa, funkcja):\n        super().__init__(None)  # Okno niezale\u017cne\n        self.parent_widget = parent\n        self.data_provider = data_provider\n        self._year = year\n        self._month = month\n        self._grupa = grupa\n        self._funkcja = funkcja\n        self._days_in_month = QDate(self._year, self._month, 1).daysInMonth()\n        self.is_dark_theme = parent.is_dark_theme if hasattr(parent, 'is_dark_theme') else False\n\n        # --- DANE CACHE ---\n        self._filtered_schedule_data = {}\n        self._all_events = []\n        self._raw_forecast_data = []\n        self._actual_staffing_matrices = {}\n\n        # --- NOWO\u015a\u0106: Flagi Leniwego \u0141adowania ---\n        # S\u0142ownik przechowuje informacj\u0119, czy dana zak\u0142adka wymaga od\u015bwie\u017cenia\n        # Kluczem jest indeks zak\u0142adki (0-6)\n        self._tabs_dirty_state = {i: True for i in range(7)}\n        # ----------------------------------------\n\n        self.setWindowFlags(Qt.Window | Qt.WindowMinimizeButtonHint | Qt.WindowMaximizeButtonHint | Qt.WindowCloseButtonHint)\n        self.setWindowTitle(f\"Szczeg\u00f3\u0142y obsady i analizy dla {month:02}/{year}\")\n        self.setMinimumSize(800, 500)\n\n        self.setup_ui()\n\n        # Pod\u0142\u0105czenie sygna\u0142u zmiany zak\u0142adki\n        self.tabs.currentChanged.connect(self._on_tab_changed)\n\n        self.apply_styles()\n\n        # Pierwsze \u0142adowanie\n        self.load_and_display_data()\n\n        self._setup_table_interactivity()\n\n        if hasattr(self.parent_widget, 'user_app_settings'):\n            saved_size = self.parent_widget.user_app_settings.get('staffing_window_size')\n            if saved_size and isinstance(saved_size, (list, tuple)) and len(saved_size) == 2:\n                self.resize(saved_size[0], saved_size[1])\n            else:\n                self.resize(1300, 800)\n\n            # --- Przywracanie Pozycji ---\n            saved_pos = self.parent_widget.user_app_settings.get('staffing_window_position')\n            if saved_pos and isinstance(saved_pos, (list, tuple)) and len(saved_pos) == 2:\n                self.move(saved_pos[0], saved_pos[1])\n\n    def setup_ui(self):\n        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        self.info_label = QLabel(f\"Analiza obsady i zdarze\u0144 dla miesi\u0105ca: {self._month:02}.{self._year}\")\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.info_label)\n        self.tabs = QTabWidget()\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.tabs)\n\n        self._create_hourly_staffing_tab()\n        self._create_daily_staffing_tab()\n        self._create_forecast_tab()\n        self._create_overtime_tab()\n        self._create_symbols_tab()\n        self._create_absence_analysis_tab()\n        self._create_flexibility_analysis_tab()\n\n        buttons_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        buttons_layout.addStretch()\n        self.refresh_button = QPushButton(\"Od\u015bwie\u017c\")\n        self.refresh_button.clicked.connect(self.load_and_display_data)\n\n        self.close_button = QPushButton(\"Zamknij\")\n\n        # --- POPRAWKA: Zmiana z self.accept na self.close ---\n        # self.close() wymusza wywo\u0142anie closeEvent, gdzie jest logika zapisu.\n        self.close_button.clicked.connect(self.close)\n        # ----------------------------------------------------\n\n        buttons_layout.addWidget(self.refresh_button)\n        buttons_layout.addWidget(self.close_button)\n        main_layout.addLayout(buttons_layout)\n\n    def apply_styles(self):\n        theme = \"dark\" if self.is_dark_theme else \"light\"\n\n        # 1. Pobierz style bazowe z klasy AppStyles\n        dialog_style = AppStyles.get_dialog_style(theme)\n        table_style = AppStyles.get_table_style(theme)\n        button_style = AppStyles.get_button_style(theme)\n        combo_style = AppStyles.get_combobox_style(theme)\n        list_style = AppStyles.get_list_style(theme)\n        tab_style = AppStyles.get_tab_widget_style(theme)\n\n        # --- POPRAWKA 2: USUNI\u0118CIE BLOKADY WYSOKO\u015aCI (PADDING) ---\n        # To jest kluczowe, aby wiersze mog\u0142y by\u0107 ni\u017csze ni\u017c domy\u015blne ~25-30px\n        table_style += \"\"\"\n            QHeaderView::section:vertical {\n                padding-top: 0px;\n                padding-bottom: 0px;\n                margin: 0px;\n                min-height: 0px;\n            }\n        \"\"\"\n\n        # --- NOWO\u015a\u0106: POBIERANIE WYSOKO\u015aCI Z PROFILU ---\n        try:\n            # Pobieramy ustawienia z g\u0142\u00f3wnego okna (rodzica)\n            settings = self.parent_widget.user_app_settings\n            active_profile_name = settings.get('active_profile', 'Podstawowy')\n            profiles = settings.get('layout_profiles', {})\n            profile = profiles.get(active_profile_name, {})\n\n            # Pobierz warto\u015b\u0107 z profilu lub u\u017cyj domy\u015blnej 22\n            target_row_height = int(profile.get('staffing_row_height', 22))\n        except Exception:\n            target_row_height = 22  # Fallback\n\n        # 2. Zastosuj styl do okna dialogowego\n        self.setStyleSheet(dialog_style)\n\n        if hasattr(self, 'tabs'):\n            self.tabs.setStyleSheet(tab_style)\n\n        # 3. Konfiguracja Tabel (QTableView)\n        all_views = [\n            self.hourly_staffing_view, self.daily_staffing_view, self.symbols_count_view,\n            self.symbols_rbh_view, self.overtime_summary_view, self.absence_summary_view,\n            self.flexibility_table_view, self.forecast_table_view, self.absence_detail_view\n        ]\n\n        for view in all_views:\n            if view:\n                view.setStyleSheet(table_style)\n\n                # Stylizacja nag\u0142\u00f3wka poziomego\n                if hasattr(view, 'horizontalHeader'):\n                    view.horizontalHeader().setFixedHeight(38)\n\n                # --- APLIKOWANIE WYSOKO\u015aCI WIERSZA ---\n                if hasattr(view, 'verticalHeader'):\n                    v_header = view.verticalHeader()\n\n                    # Zdejmij ograniczenie minimalne\n                    v_header.setMinimumSectionSize(15)\n\n                    # Ustaw tryb na Fixed (ignoruje zawarto\u015b\u0107 przy liczeniu wysoko\u015bci)\n                    v_header.setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.ResizeMode.Fixed)\n\n                    # Ustaw docelow\u0105 wysoko\u015b\u0107 pobran\u0105 z ustawie\u0144\n                    v_header.setDefaultSectionSize(target_row_height)\n\n        # 4. Przyciski\n        all_buttons = [self.refresh_button, self.close_button, self.absence_back_button]\n        for button in all_buttons:\n            if button: button.setStyleSheet(button_style)\n\n        # 5. ComboBoxy\n        all_combos = [\n            self.hourly_staffing_options_combo, self.hourly_location_combo,\n            self.daily_staffing_options_combo, self.daily_location_combo,\n            self.forecast_group_combo, self.forecast_view_mode_combo\n        ]\n        for combo in all_combos:\n            if combo: combo.setStyleSheet(combo_style)\n\n        # 6. Listy\n        if hasattr(self, 'absence_symbols_list'):\n            self.absence_symbols_list.setStyleSheet(list_style)\n\n        # 7. KPI Boxy (Ramki z wynikami)\n        if theme == \"dark\":\n            kpi_frame_style = f\"QFrame {{ background-color: {AppStyles.DARK_BACKGROUND_CONTROLS}; border: 1px solid {AppStyles.DARK_BORDER_PRIMARY}; border-radius: {AppStyles.BORDER_RADIUS}; }}\"\n            kpi_title_style = f\"font-size: 10pt; color: {AppStyles.DARK_TEXT_SECONDARY}; background-color: transparent; border: none;\"\n            kpi_value_style = f\"font-size: 18pt; font-weight: bold; color: {AppStyles.DARK_TEXT_PRIMARY}; background-color: transparent; border: none;\"\n        else:\n            kpi_frame_style = f\"QFrame {{ background-color: {AppStyles.LIGHT_BACKGROUND_CONTROLS}; border: 1px solid {AppStyles.LIGHT_BORDER_PRIMARY}; border-radius: {AppStyles.BORDER_RADIUS}; }}\"\n            kpi_title_style = f\"font-size: 10pt; color: {AppStyles.LIGHT_TEXT_SECONDARY}; background-color: transparent; border: none;\"\n            kpi_value_style = f\"font-size: 18pt; font-weight: bold; color: {AppStyles.LIGHT_TEXT_PRIMARY}; background-color: transparent; border: none;\"\n\n        kpi_boxes = [\n            self.total_absence_hours_label, self.absence_rate_label,\n            self.top_absent_dept_label, self.top_absent_emp_label\n        ]\n        for frame in kpi_boxes:\n            if frame:\n                frame.setStyleSheet(kpi_frame_style)\n                if hasattr(frame, 'value_label'):\n                    frame.value_label.setStyleSheet(kpi_value_style)\n                title_label = frame.findChild(QLabel)\n                if title_label and title_label != getattr(frame, 'value_label', None):\n                    title_label.setStyleSheet(kpi_title_style)\n\n    def _get_theme_colors(self):\n        if self.is_dark_theme:\n            return QColor(\"#2c3136\"), QColor(\"white\")\n        else:\n            return QColor(\"#f8f9fa\"), QColor(\"black\")\n\n    def _create_hourly_staffing_tab(self):\n        widget = QWidget()\n  splitter.addWidget(top_splitter)\n\n        self.absence_chart = QChartView()\n        self.absence_chart.setRenderHint(QPainter.RenderHint.Antialiasing)\n        splitter.addWidget(self.absence_chart)\n\n        main_tab_layout.addWidget(splitter)\n        self.tabs.addTab(widget, \"Analiza Absencji\")\n\n    def _create_flexibility_analysis_tab(self):\n frame.setLineWidth(1)\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(frame)\n        title_label = QLabel(title)\n        title_label.setAlignment(Qt.AlignmentFlag.AlignCenter)\n\n        # --- USUNI\u0118TA ZMIANA ---\n        # Usuni\u0119to: title_label.setStyleSheet(\"font-size: 10pt; color: gray;\")\n        # --- KONIEC ZMIANY ---\n\n        value_label = QLabel(\"0\")\n
