"training_module/training_data_provider.py", "content": "# training_module/training_data_provider.py\n\nfrom db_connector import DatabaseConnector, get_modifier_id\nfrom debug_utils import log_error, debug_print\nfrom config import SQL_OBJECTS\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional\nimport pyodbc\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nclass TrainingDataProvider:\n    \"\"\"\n    Klasa odpowiedzialna za komunikacj\u0119 modu\u0142u szkoleniowego z baz\u0105 danych.\n    Oddziela warstw\u0119 danych od logiki UI.\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self):\n        self.db_connector = DatabaseConnector()\n\n    def get_dict_courses(self) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera s\u0142ownik dost\u0119pnych szkole\u0144 podstawowych.\"\"\"\n        query = \"SELECT Id, Temat, Nazwa FROM p_T_SL_Szkolenia\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n\n    def get_training_stages(self, include_inactive=False) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera zdefiniowane koszyki/etapy szkoleniowe.\"\"\"\n        query = \"SELECT Id, Nazwa, Opis, DataOd, DataDo, LiczbaDni, LiczbaGodzin, Status, Wstepny FROM p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe\"\n        if not include_inactive:\n            query += \" WHERE Status = 1\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n\n    def get_training_stages_with_stats(self, include_inactive=False) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera etapy szkoleniowe wraz ze statystykami w jednym zapytaniu.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                e.Id, e.Nazwa, e.Opis, e.DataOd, e.DataDo, e.LiczbaDni, e.LiczbaGodzin, e.Status, e.Wstepny,\n                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SzkolenieId) FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap WHERE EtapId = e.Id AND Aktywne = 1) as LiczbaSzkolen,\n                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Uzytkownik) FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap WHERE EtapId = e.Id) as LiczbaKonsultantow,\n                (SELECT AVG(CAST(ProcentUkoczenia AS FLOAT)) FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap WHERE EtapId = e.Id) as SredniPostep\n            FROM p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe e\n        \"\"\"\n        if not include_inactive:\n            query += \" WHERE e.Status = 1\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n\n    def create_training_stage(self, data: Dict) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Tworzy nowy etap szkoleniowy w bazie.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            INSERT INTO p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe \n            (Nazwa, Opis, DataOd, DataDo, LiczbaDni, LiczbaGodzin, Status, Wstepny)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n        \"\"\"\n        params = (\n            data.get('Nazwa'), data.get('Opis'),\n            data.get('DataOd'), data.get('DataDo'), data.get('LiczbaDni'),\n            data.get('LiczbaGodzin'), data.get('Status', 1), data.get('Wstepny', 0)\n        )\n        return self._execute_query(query, params)\n\n    def update_training_stage(self, stage_id: int, data: Dict) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Aktualizuje istniej\u0105cy etap szkoleniowy w bazie.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            UPDATE p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe \n            SET Nazwa = ?, Opis = ?, \n                DataOd = ?, DataDo = ?, LiczbaDni = ?, \n                LiczbaGodzin = ?, Status = ?, Wstepny = ?\n            WHERE Id = ?\n        \"\"\"\n        params = (\n            data.get('Nazwa'), data.get('Opis'),\n            data.get('DataOd'), data.get('DataDo'), data.get('LiczbaDni'),\n            data.get('LiczbaGodzin'), data.get('Status', 1), data.get('Wstepny', 0),\n            stage_id\n        )\n        return self._execute_query(query, params)\n\n    def add_training_to_stage(self, stage_id: int, training_id: str, mapping_type: str = 'R') -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Przypisuje szkolenie do etapu szkoleniowego (lub aktywuje ponownie).\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap WHERE EtapId = ? AND SzkolenieId = ?)\n            BEGIN\n                UPDATE p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap\n                SET Aktywne = 1, DataModyfikacji = GETDATE(), Modyfikujacy = ?, TypMapowania = ?\n                WHERE EtapId = ? AND SzkolenieId = ?\n            END\n            ELSE\n            BEGIN\n                INSERT INTO p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap (EtapId, SzkolenieId, Aktywne, DataModyfikacji, Modyfikujacy, TypMapowania)\n                VALUES (?, ?, 1, GETDATE(), ?, ?)\n            END\n        \"\"\"\n        modifier_id = get_modifier_id()[0]\n        # Przekonwertuj na int je\u015bli mo\u017cliwe\n        try: modifier_id = int(modifier_id)\n        except: modifier_id = 0\n        \n        params = (\n            stage_id, training_id, modifier_id, mapping_type, stage_id, training_id,\n            stage_id, training_id, modifier_id, mapping_type\n        )\n        return self._execute_query(query, params)\n\n    def remove_training_from_stage(self, mapping_id: int) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Zmienia status przypisania szkolenia z etapu szkoleniowego na nieaktywny.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            UPDATE p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap \n            SET Aktywne = 0, DataModyfikacji = GETDATE(), Modyfikujacy = ?\n            WHERE Id = ?\n        \"\"\"\n        modifier_id = get_modifier_id()[0]\n        try: modifier_id = int(modifier_id)\n        except: modifier_id = 0\n        return self._execute_query(query, (modifier_id, mapping_id))\n\n    def get_trainings_for_stage(self, stage_id: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera list\u0119 aktywnych szkole\u0144 przypisanych do etapu.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT m.Id as MapId, m.SzkolenieId, s.Nazwa, s.Temat, m.TypMapowania\n            FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap m\n            JOIN p_T_SL_Szkolenia s ON m.SzkolenieId = s.Id\n            WHERE m.EtapId = ? AND m.Aktywne = 1\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (stage_id,))\n\n    def get_all_active_mappings(self) -> set:\n        \"\"\"Zwraca zbi\u00f3r SzkolenieId aktywnie zmapowanych do dowolnego etapu.\"\"\"\n        query = \"SELECT DISTINCT SzkolenieId FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap WHERE Aktywne = 1\"\n        rows = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n        return {str(r['SzkolenieId']) for r in rows}\n\n    # --- Hasztag CRUD ---\n\n    def get_hashtags_for_stage(self, stage_id: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera hasztagi przypisane do etapu.\"\"\"\n        query = \"SELECT Id, Hasztag FROM p_T_SL_EtapHasztagi WHERE EtapId = ? ORDER BY Id\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (stage_id,))\n\n    def add_hashtag_to_stage(self, stage_id: int, hashtag: str) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Dodaje hasztag do etapu. Zwraca False je\u015bli duplikat lub b\u0142\u0105d.\"\"\"\n        check_query = \"SELECT COUNT(1) as Cnt FROM p_T_SL_EtapHasztagi WHERE EtapId = ? AND Hasztag = ?\"\n        result = self._fetch_all_as_dict(check_query, (stage_id, hashtag))\n        if result and result[0]['Cnt'] > 0:\n            return False\n        insert_query = \"INSERT INTO p_T_SL_EtapHasztagi (EtapId, Hasztag) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n        return self._execute_query(insert_query, (stage_id, hashtag))\n\n    def remove_hashtag_from_stage(self, hashtag_id: int) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Usuwa hasztag po jego Id.\"\"\"\n        query = \"DELETE FROM p_T_SL_EtapHasztagi WHERE Id = ?\"\n        return self._execute_query(query, (hashtag_id,))\n\n    def get_users_in_stage(self, stage_id: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera pracownik\u00f3w przypisanych do konkretnego koszyka/etapu z wyliczonym statusem.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT ue.Id, ue.Uzytkownik, ue.StatusZaliczenia, ue.ProcentUkoczenia, ue.Deadline,\n                   e.Nazwa as EtapNazwa, p.UzytkownikDane as PracownikNazwisko,\n                   CASE \n                       WHEN ue.ProcentUkoczenia >= 100 THEN 'Completed'\n                       WHEN ue.Deadline < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 'Overdue'\n                       WHEN ue.Deadline <= DATEADD(day, 3, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 'Warning'\n                       ELSE 'InProgress'\n                   END as StatusKodu\n            FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap ue\n            JOIN p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe e ON ue.EtapId = e.Id\n            LEFT JOIN dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia p ON ue.Uzytkownik = p.Id\n            WHERE ue.EtapId = ?\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (stage_id,))\n\n    def get_users_in_stage_for_employee(self, employee_id: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera wszystkie etapy przypisane do konkretnego pracownika (id z p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia).\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT ue.Id, ue.Uzytkownik, ue.StatusZaliczenia, ue.ProcentUkoczenia, ue.Deadline,\n                   e.Nazwa as EtapNazwa, e.Opis,\n                   CASE \n                       WHEN ue.ProcentUkoczenia >= 100 THEN 'Completed'\n                       WHEN ue.Deadline < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 'Overdue'\n                       WHEN ue.Deadline <= DATEADD(day, 3, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 'Warning'\n                       ELSE 'InProgress'\n                   END as StatusKodu\n            FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap ue\n            JOIN p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe e ON ue.EtapId = e.Id\n            WHERE ue.Uzytkownik = ?\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (employee_id,))\n\n    def get_all_delegations(self) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera wszystkie delegacje dla wszystkich etap\u00f3w do g\u0142\u00f3wnego widoku MS.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT ue.Id, ue.Uzytkownik, ue.ProcentUkoczenia, ue.Deadline,\n                   e.Id as EtapId, e.Nazwa as EtapNazwa, \n                   p.UzytkownikDane as PracownikNazwisko,\n                   (\n                       SELECT TOP 1 f.PrzelozonyNazwiskoImie \n                       FROM dbo.fn_GetScheduleData(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 0, 0) f \n                       WHERE f.Uzytkownik = p.Uzytkownik\n                   ) as Przelozony,\n                   CASE \n                       WHEN ue.ProcentUkoczenia >= 100 THEN 'Completed'\n                       WHEN ue.Deadline < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) THEN 'Overdue'\n                       WHEN ue.Deadline <= DATEADD(day, 3, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 'Warning'\n                       ELSE 'InProgress'\n                   END as StatusKodu\n            FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap ue\n            JOIN p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe e ON ue.EtapId = e.Id\n            LEFT JOIN dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia p ON ue.Uzytkownik = p.Id\n            ORDER BY ue.Deadline ASC, p.UzytkownikDane ASC\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n\n    def get_delegation_details(self, employee_id: int, stage_id: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera szczeg\u00f3\u0142owe por\u00f3wnanie: co jest wymagane w etapie vs co pracownik ju\u017c uko\u0144czy\u0142.\n        employee_id: int (Id z p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia)\n        \"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                sl.Id as SzkolenieId,\n                sl.Nazwa as SzkolenieNazwa,\n                sl.Temat,\n                CASE WHEN s.Id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as IsCompleted,\n                s.DataOd as DataUkonczenia\n            FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap m\n            JOIN p_T_SL_Szkolenia sl ON m.SzkolenieId = sl.Id\n            -- Joinujemy z rzeczywistymi szkoleniami pracownika\n            LEFT JOIN (\n                SELECT s_inner.SzkolenieId, s_inner.Uzytkownik, MAX(s_inner.DataOd) as DataOd\n                FROM dbo.p_t_zz_Szkolenia s_inner\n                JOIN dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia p ON s_inner.Uzytkownik = p.Uzytkownik\n                WHERE p.Id = ?\n                GROUP BY s_inner.SzkolenieId, s_inner.Uzytkownik\n            ) s ON s.SzkolenieId = sl.Id\n            WHERE m.EtapId = ? AND m.Aktywne = 1\n            ORDER BY IsCompleted DESC, sl.Nazwa ASC\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (employee_id, stage_id))\n\n    def get_stage_summary_stats(self, stage_id: int) -> Dict:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera statystyki zbiorcze dla etapu szkoleniowego.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SzkolenieId) FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap WHERE EtapId = ? AND Aktywne = 1) as LiczbaSzkolen,\n                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Uzytkownik) FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap WHERE EtapId = ?) as LiczbaKonsultantow,\n                (SELECT AVG(CAST(ProcentUkoczenia AS FLOAT)) FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap WHERE EtapId = ?) as SredniPostep\n        \"\"\"\n        result = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (stage_id, stage_id, stage_id))\n        return result[0] if result else {'LiczbaSzkolen': 0, 'LiczbaKonsultantow': 0, 'SredniPostep': 0}\n\n    def get_employee_trainings_in_stage(self, employee_id: int, stage_id: int) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera list\u0119 konkretnych szkole\u0144 pracownika, kt\u00f3re pasuj\u0105 do zmapowanych w etapie.\n        employee_id: int (Id z p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia)\n        \"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT \n                s.DataOd, \n                s.DataDo, \n                DATEDIFF(day, s.DataOd, s.DataDo) + 1 as LiczbaDni,\n                sl.Nazwa as SzkolenieNazwa,\n                NULL as LiczbaGodzin,\n                (\n                    SELECT \n                        CASE DAY(s.DataOd)\n                            WHEN 1 THEN CAST([1] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 2 THEN CAST([2] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 3 THEN CAST([3] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 4 THEN CAST([4] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 5 THEN CAST([5] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 6 THEN CAST([6] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 7 THEN CAST([7] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 8 THEN CAST([8] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 9 THEN CAST([9] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 10 THEN CAST([10] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 11 THEN CAST([11] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 12 THEN CAST([12] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 13 THEN CAST([13] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 14 THEN CAST([14] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 15 THEN CAST([15] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 16 THEN CAST([16] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 17 THEN CAST([17] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 18 THEN CAST([18] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 19 THEN CAST([19] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 20 THEN CAST([20] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 21 THEN CAST([21] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 22 THEN CAST([22] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 23 THEN CAST([23] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 24 THEN CAST([24] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 25 THEN CAST([25] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 26 THEN CAST([26] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 27 THEN CAST([27] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 28 THEN CAST([28] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 29 THEN CAST([29] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 30 THEN CAST([30] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                            WHEN 31 THEN CAST([31] AS VARCHAR(100))\n                        END\n                    FROM dbo.fn_GetScheduleData(YEAR(s.DataOd), MONTH(s.DataOd), 0, 0) f\n                    WHERE f.Uzytkownik = s.Uzytkownik\n                ) as Symbol\n            FROM dbo.p_t_zz_Szkolenia s\n            JOIN p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap m ON s.SzkolenieId = m.SzkolenieId\n            JOIN p_T_SL_Szkolenia sl ON s.SzkolenieId = sl.Id\n            JOIN dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia p ON s.Uzytkownik = p.Uzytkownik\n            WHERE m.EtapId = ? AND p.Id = ? AND m.Aktywne = 1\n            ORDER BY s.DataOd DESC\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (stage_id, employee_id))\n\n    def assign_user_to_stage(self, employee_id: int, stage_id: int, deadline=None) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Przypisuje (deleguje) pracownika do koszyka/etapu.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            INSERT INTO p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap (Uzytkownik, EtapId, Deadline)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?)\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._execute_query(query, (employee_id, stage_id, deadline))\n\n    def update_user_progress(self, mapping_id: int, status: int, progress: int) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Aktualizuje post\u0119p szkolenia pracownika.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            UPDATE p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap\n            SET StatusZaliczenia = ?, ProcentUkoczenia = ?\n            WHERE Id = ?\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._execute_query(query, (status, progress, mapping_id))\n\n    def get_initial_stages(self) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera aktywne etapy szkoleniowe oznaczone jako wst\u0119pne.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT Id, Nazwa, DataOd, DataDo, LiczbaDni\n            FROM p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe\n            WHERE Status = 1 AND Wstepny = 1\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n\n    def is_user_assigned_to_stage(self, employee_id: int, stage_id: int) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Sprawdza czy pracownik jest ju\u017c przypisany do danego etapu.\"\"\"\n        query = \"\"\"\n            SELECT COUNT(1) as Cnt\n            FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap\n            WHERE Uzytkownik = ? AND EtapId = ?\n        \"\"\"\n        result = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (employee_id, stage_id))\n        return result[0]['Cnt'] > 0 if result else False\n\n    def get_new_employees(self, date_from, date_to) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera pracownik\u00f3w zatrudnionych w podanym zakresie dat.\n        Nazwa tabeli \u017ar\u00f3d\u0142owej jest konfigurowalna w config.ini (klucz: zrodlodatyzatrudnienia).\n        Na produkcji nale\u017cy podmieni\u0107 na w\u0142a\u015bciwy widok/tabel\u0119 kadrow\u0105.\n        \"\"\"\n        table_name = SQL_OBJECTS.get('zrodlodatyzatrudnienia', 'dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia')\n        query = f\"\"\"\n            SELECT DISTINCT\n                Id as PracownikId,\n                UzytkownikDane as Nazwisko\n            FROM {table_name}\n            WHERE DataZatrudnienia BETWEEN ? AND ?\n              AND Id IS NOT NULL\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, (date_from, date_to))\n\n    def get_all_active_employees(self) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera list\u0119 wszystkich aktywnych pracownik\u00f3w (ID i Nazwisko).\"\"\"\n        table_name = SQL_OBJECTS.get('zrodlodatyzatrudnienia', 'dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia')\n        query = f\"SELECT DISTINCT Id as PracownikId, UzytkownikDane as Nazwisko FROM {table_name} WHERE Id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY UzytkownikDane\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n\n    def get_all_employees_with_details(self) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pobiera list\u0119 wszystkich pracownik\u00f3w wraz z dzia\u0142em i prze\u0142o\u017conym.\"\"\"\n        table_name = SQL_OBJECTS.get('zrodlodatyzatrudnienia', 'dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia')\n        query = f\"\"\"\n            SELECT DISTINCT \n                p.Id as PracownikId, \n                p.UzytkownikDane as Nazwisko,\n                NULL as Wydzial,\n                NULL as Przelozony\n            FROM {table_name} p\n            WHERE p.Id IS NOT NULL\n            ORDER BY p.UzytkownikDane\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._fetch_all_as_dict(query)\n\n    def get_users_current_stages_bulk(self, employee_ids: List[int]) -> Dict[int, Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera dla listy pracownik\u00f3w przypisane etapy szkoleniowe i formatuje jako z\u0142\u0105czony ci\u0105g znak\u00f3w.\n        employee_ids: List[int]\n        \"\"\"\n        if not employee_ids:\n            return {}\n            \n        placeholders = ','.join(['?'] * len(employee_ids))\n        query = f\"\"\"\n            SELECT ue.Uzytkownik, e.Id as EtapId, e.Nazwa\n            FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap ue\n            JOIN p_T_SL_EtapySzkoleniowe e ON ue.EtapId = e.Id\n            WHERE ue.Uzytkownik IN ({placeholders})\n        \"\"\"\n        rows = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query, tuple(employee_ids))\n        \n        result = {}\n        for row in rows:\n            emp_id = row['Uzytkownik']\n            if emp_id not in result:\n                result[emp_id] = {'names': [], 'ids': set()}\n            result[emp_id]['names'].append(row['Nazwa'])\n            result[emp_id]['ids'].add(row['EtapId'])\n            \n        for emp_id in result:\n            result[emp_id]['names_str'] = \", \".join(result[emp_id]['names'])\n            \n        return result\n\n    def get_hierarchical_training_data(self) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Pobiera kompletn\u0105 struktur\u0119: Etap -> Pracownik -> Szkolenia.\n        Zwraca list\u0119 etap\u00f3w, gdzie ka\u017cdy ma list\u0119 'Employees'.\n        \"\"\"\n        table_name = SQL_OBJECTS.get('zrodlodatyzatrudnienia', 'dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia')\n        \n        # 1. Pobierz Etapy\n        stages = self.get_training_stages_with_stats()\n        \n        # 2. Pobierz przypisanych pracownik\u00f3w dla wszystkich etap\u00f3w\n        query_employees = f\"\"\"\n            SELECT ue.Id as UEId, ue.EtapId, ue.Uzytkownik as PracownikId, ue.ProcentUkoczenia, ue.Deadline,\n                   ue.StatusZaliczenia, ue.DataZaliczenia,\n                   p.UzytkownikDane, p.DataZatrudnienia, p.RodzajZatrudnienia, p.NumerRekrutacji, \n                   p.NumerKadrowy, p.StatusZatrudnienia\n            FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap ue\n            JOIN {table_name} p ON ue.Uzytkownik = p.Uzytkownik\n        \"\"\"\n        all_emp_rows = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query_employees)\n        \n        # 3. Pobierz mapowania szkole\u0144\n        query_mappings = \"\"\"\n            SELECT m.EtapId, m.SzkolenieId, s.Nazwa as SzkolenieNazwa, s.Temat, m.TypMapowania, m.Id as MappingId\n            FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap m\n            JOIN p_T_SL_Szkolenia s ON m.SzkolenieId = s.Id\n            WHERE m.Aktywne = 1\n        \"\"\"\n        all_mappings = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query_mappings)\n        \n        # 4. Pobierz WSZYSTKIE realizacje dla tych szkole\u0144 (delegacje)\n        query_realizations = \"\"\"\n            SELECT SzkolenieId, Uzytkownik, [Data] as DataSzkolenia,\n                   CASE WHEN DataDo IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE DATEDIFF(HOUR, DataOd, DataDo) END as RBH\n            FROM dbo.p_t_zz_Szkolenia\n        \"\"\"\n        all_realizations = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query_realizations)\n        real_map = {} # (SzkolenieId, Uzytkownik) -> data\n        for r in all_realizations:\n            # U\u017cywamy rzutowania na str dla kluczy, aby unikn\u0105\u0107 problem\u00f3w z typami (int vs string)\n            key = (str(r['SzkolenieId']), str(r['Uzytkownik']))\n            real_map[key] = r\n\n        # 5. Statusy modu\u0142owe\n        query_statuses = \"SELECT UEId, SzkolenieId, DataZaliczenia, Dopuszczone FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikSzkolenieStatus\"\n        all_statuses_res = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query_statuses)\n        status_map = {}\n        for s in all_statuses_res:\n            status_map[(str(s['UEId']), str(s['SzkolenieId']))] = s\n\n        # Budowanie struktury\n        for stage in stages:\n            sid = stage['Id']\n            stage['Employees'] = [e for e in all_emp_rows if str(e['EtapId']) == str(sid)]\n            stage_mappings = [m for m in all_mappings if str(m['EtapId']) == str(sid)]\n            \n            stage_total_rbh = 0\n            for emp in stage['Employees']:\n                ue_id = str(emp['UEId'])\n                emp_login = str(emp.get('PracownikId') or '')\n                emp_rbh = 0\n                emp['Trainings'] = []\n                \n                for m in stage_mappings:\n                    t_info = m.copy()\n                    szk_id = str(m['SzkolenieId'])\n                    \n                    # 1. Sprawd\u017a realizacj\u0119 w delegacjach\n                    real = real_map.get((szk_id, emp_login))\n                    real_rbh = real['RBH'] if real else 0\n                    real_date = str(real['DataSzkolenia'] if real else '')\n                    \n                    # 2. Sprawd\u017a status w module\n                    status = status_map.get((ue_id, szk_id))\n                    if status:\n                        t_info['DataZaliczenia'] = str(status.get('DataZaliczenia') or real_date)\n                        t_info['Dopuszczone'] = bool(status.get('Dopuszczone'))\n                    else:\n                        t_info['DataZaliczenia'] = real_date\n                        t_info['Dopuszczone'] = False\n                    \n                    t_info['RBH'] = real_rbh\n                    emp_rbh += real_rbh\n                    emp['Trainings'].append(t_info)\n                \n                emp['SumaRBH'] = emp_rbh\n                stage_total_rbh += emp_rbh\n            \n            stage['SumaRBH'] = stage_total_rbh\n            \n        return stages\n\n    def update_training_completion_details(self, ue_id: int, mapping_id: int, completion_date: str, is_approved: bool) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Aktualizuje dat\u0119 zaliczenia i status dopuszczenia w p_T_MS_UzytkownikSzkolenieStatus.\"\"\"\n        # Najpierw pobierz SzkolenieId z mapowania\n        query_map = \"SELECT SzkolenieId FROM p_T_MS_EtapSzkolenieMap WHERE Id = ?\"\n        map_res = self._fetch_all_as_dict(query_map, (mapping_id,))\n        if not map_res: return False\n        szkolenie_id = map_res[0]['SzkolenieId']\n        \n        # Je\u015bli ue_id to 0, pobierz je dla tego mapping_id (logika uproszczona)\n        # TODO: Poprawi\u0107 przekazywanie ue_id z modelu hierarchicznego\n        \n        modifier_id = get_modifier_id()[0]\n        try: modifier_id = int(modifier_id)\n        except: modifier_id = 0\n\n        query = \"\"\"\n            IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikSzkolenieStatus WHERE UEId = ? AND SzkolenieId = ?)\n            BEGIN\n                UPDATE p_T_MS_UzytkownikSzkolenieStatus\n                SET DataZaliczenia = ?, Dopuszczone = ?, DataModyfikacji = GETDATE(), Modyfikujacy = ?\n                WHERE UEId = ? AND SzkolenieId = ?\n            END\n            ELSE\n            BEGIN\n                INSERT INTO p_T_MS_UzytkownikSzkolenieStatus (UEId, SzkolenieId, DataZaliczenia, Dopuszczone, Modyfikujacy)\n                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n            END\n        \"\"\"\n        # Uproszczony mock dla ue_id je\u015bli nie przekazano\n        if ue_id == 0:\n            # Szukamy pierwszego ue_id kt\u00f3ry ma ten etap (to jest tylko do test\u00f3w/demo)\n            pass\n\n        params = (\n            ue_id, szkolenie_id, completion_date, 1 if is_approved else 0, modifier_id, ue_id, szkolenie_id,\n            ue_id, szkolenie_id, completion_date, 1 if is_approved else 0, modifier_id\n        )\n        return self._execute_query(query, params)\n\n    def update_user_stage_status(self, ue_id: int, status_zaliczenia: int, completion_date: str = None) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Aktualizuje og\u00f3lny status zaliczenia etapu dla u\u017cytkownika.\"\"\"\n        modifier_id = get_modifier_id()[0]\n        try: modifier_id = int(modifier_id)\n        except: modifier_id = 0\n        \n        query = \"\"\"\n            UPDATE p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap\n            SET StatusZaliczenia = ?, DataZaliczenia = ?, ProcentUkoczenia = ?\n            WHERE Id = ?\n        \"\"\"\n        # Je\u015bli zaliczony, ustawiamy 100%, je\u015bli nie - zostawiamy 0 (lub wyliczamy p\u00f3\u017aniej)\n        progress = 100 if status_zaliczenia == 1 else 0\n        params = (status_zaliczenia, completion_date, progress, ue_id)\n        return self._execute_query(query, params)\n\n    def update_employment_status(self, employee_id: int, status: str) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Aktualizuje status zatrudnienia pracownika w tabeli kadrowej.\"\"\"\n        table_name = SQL_OBJECTS.get('zrodlodatyzatrudnienia', 'dbo.p_T_SL_PracownicyDatyZatrudnienia')\n        query = f\"UPDATE {table_name} SET StatusZatrudnienia = ? WHERE Id = ?\"\n        return self._execute_query(query, (status, employee_id))\n\n    def bulk_assign_users_to_stage(self, employee_ids: List[int], stage_id: int, deadline=None) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Przypisuje masowo wielu pracownik\u00f3w do etapu szkoleniowego.\"\"\"\n        if not employee_ids:\n            return True\n        \n        query = \"\"\"\n            IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap WHERE Uzytkownik = ? AND EtapId = ?)\n            INSERT INTO p_T_MS_UzytkownikEtap (Uzytkownik, EtapId, Deadline, StatusZaliczenia, ProcentUkoczenia)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, 0, 0)\n        \"\"\"\n        \n        success = True\n        for emp_id in employee_ids:\n            try:\n                # Uwaga: u\u017cywamy istniej\u0105cego _execute_query\n                res = self._execute_query(query, (emp_id, stage_id, emp_id, stage_id, deadline))\n                if not res:\n                    success = False\n            except Exception as e:\n                from debug_utils import log_error\n                log_error(f\"Bulk assign error for {emp_id}: {e}\")\n                success = False\n        return success\n\n    def _fetch_all_as_dict(self, query: str, params=()) -> List[Dict]:\n        \"\"\"Pomocnicza metoda do pobierania wynik\u00f3w jako s\u0142owniki.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            with self.db_connector.managed_connection() as conn:\n                cursor = conn.cursor()\n                cursor.execute(query, params)\n                columns = [column[0] for column in cursor.description]\n                results = []\n                for row in cursor.fetchall():\n                    results.append(dict(zip(columns, row)))\n                return results\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d DB przy wykonywaniu instrukcji: {query}: {e}\", exception=e)\n            return []\n\n    def _execute_query(self, query: str, params=()) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Pomocnicza metoda do wykonywania zapyta\u0144 modyfikuj\u0105cych (INSERT, UPDATE).\"\"\"\n        try:\n            with self.db_connector.managed_connection() as conn:\n                cursor = conn.cursor()\n                cursor.execute(query, params)\n                conn.commit()\n                return True\n        except Exception as e:\n            log_error(f\"B\u0142\u0105d DB przy wykonywaniu instrukcji modyfikuj\u0105cej: {query}: {e}\", exception=e)\n Korzystamy z nowej metody hierarchicznej\n            hierarchical_data = self.data_provider.get_hierarchical_training_data()\n            self.finished.emit(hierarchical_data)\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.error.emit(str(e))\n\nclass GeneralTrainingView(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    Widok og\u00f3lny (HR Dashboard). Pokazuje list\u0119 wszystkich aktywnych etap\u00f3w\n    szkoleniowych w formie rozwijanych kart.\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, data_provider: TrainingDataProvider, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.data_provider = data_provider\n        self.loading_thread = None\n        self.setup_ui()\n        self.load_data()\n\n    def setup_ui(self):\n        main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        main_layout.setContentsMargins(15, 15, 15, 15)\n        main_layout.setSpacing(10)\n\n        # 1. Nag\u0142\u00f3wek i przyciski akcji\n        header_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        self.title = QLabel(\"Widok og\u00f3lny - Wszystkie etapy szkoleniowe\")\n        title_font = QFont()\n        title_font.setPointSize(14)\n        title_font.setBold(True)\n        self.title.setFont(title_font)\n        header_layout.addWidget(self.title)\n        header_layout.addStretch()\n\n        self.btn_customize = QPushButton(\"\u2699\ufe0f Dostosuj widok\")\n        self.btn_export_excel = QPushButton(\"\ud83d\udcca Eksport Excel\")\n        self.btn_teams = QPushButton(\"\ud83d\udcac Teams\")\n        self.btn_outlook = QPushButton(\"\u2709\ufe0f Outlook\")\n        \n        # 3. Drzewo Hierarchiczne (Zdefiniowane wcze\u015bniej, aby m\u00f3c podpi\u0105\u0107 sygna\u0142y)\n        self.tree = QTreeView()\n        self.tree.setAlternatingRowColors(True)\n        self.tree.setSelectionMode(QAbstractItemView.ExtendedSelection)\n        self.tree.setAnimated(True)\n        self.tree.setIndentation(20)\n        self.tree.setContextMenuPolicy(Qt.CustomContextMenu)\n        self.tree.customContextMenuRequested.connect(self.show_context_menu)\n        # Przywracamy standardowe edytowanie (DoubleClicked)\n        self.tree.setEditTriggers(QAbstractItemView.DoubleClicked)\n\n        self.model = HierarchicalTrainingModel(self)\n        self.tree.setModel(self.model)\n        \n        self.delegate = TrainingStatusDelegate(self)\n        self.tree.setItemDelegate(self.delegate)\n        self.delegate.status_changed.connect(self.on_delegate_status_changed)\n        \n        header = self.tree.header()\n        header.setSectionResizeMode(QHeaderView.Interactive)\n        # Rezygnujemy ze sztywnego rozmiaru tutaj, wymusimy go w on_data_loaded\n        header.setStretchLastSection(True) \n\n        for btn in (self.btn_customize, self.btn_export_excel, self.btn_teams, self.btn_outlook):\n            header_layout.addWidget(btn)\n\n        self.btn_customize.clicked.connect(self.on_customize_view)\n        self.btn_export_excel.clicked.connect(self.on_export_excel)\n        self.btn_teams.clicked.connect(self.on_teams_clicked)\n        self.btn_outlook.clicked.connect(self.on_outlook_clicked)\n        \n        main_layout.addLayout(header_layout)\n\n        # 2. Panel z filtrami\n        from training_module.training_views.filters_view import TrainingFiltersView\n        self.filters_panel = TrainingFiltersView()\n        self.filters_panel.filtersChanged.connect(self.filter_data)\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.filters_panel)\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.tree)\n        \n        # 4. Loader\n        self.loader_label = QLabel(\"\u231b \u0141adowanie danych szkoleniowych...\")\n        self.loader_label.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)\n        self.loader_label.setStyleSheet(\"padding: 10px; font-style: italic; color: #888;\")\n        main_layout.addWidget(self.loader_label)\n        self.loader_label.hide()\n\n    def update_theme(self, theme):\n        self.theme = theme\n        text_color = AppStyles.DARK_TEXT_PRIMARY if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.LIGHT_TEXT_PRIMARY\n        self.title.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {text_color};\")\n        \n        if hasattr(self, 'filters_panel') and hasattr(self.filters_panel, 'update_theme'):\n            self.filters_panel.update_theme(theme)\n        \n        self.tree.setStyleSheet(AppStyles.get_table_style(theme))\n        for btn in (self.btn_customize, self.btn_export_excel, self.btn_teams, self.btn_outlook):\n            btn.setStyleSheet(AppStyles.get_button_style(theme))\n\n    def load_data(self):\n        \"\"\"Uruchamia asynchroniczne pobieranie danych.\"\"\"\n        if self.loading_thread is not None:\n            try:\n                if self.loading_thread.isRunning():\n                    return\n            except RuntimeError:\n                self.loading_thread = None\n\n        # Poka\u017c loader\n        self.loader_label.show()\n        self.loader_label.setText(\"\u231b Pobieranie danych z bazy...\")\n\n        # Wyczy\u015b\u0107 tabel\u0119 (model obs\u0142u\u017cy to sam przy populate)\n        pass\n\n        # Konfiguracja w\u0105tku\n        self.loading_thread = QThread()\n        self.worker = TrainingLoadWorker(self.data_provider)\n        self.worker.moveToThread(self.loading_thread)\n        \n        self.loading_thread.started.connect(self.worker.run)\n        self.worker.finished.connect(self.on_data_loaded)\n        self.worker.error.connect(self.on_load_error)\n        \n        # Sprz\u0105tanie\n        self.worker.finished.connect(self.loading_thread.quit)\n        self.worker.finished.connect(self.worker.deleteLater)\n        self.loading_thread.finished.connect(self.loading_thread.deleteLater)\n        \n        self.loading_thread.start()\n\n    def on_data_loaded(self, stages):\n        \"\"\"Wywo\u0142ywane gdy dane s\u0105 gotowe. Wype\u0142nia model drzewa.\"\"\"\n        self.loader_label.hide()\n        \n        if not stages:\n            self.loader_label.setText(\"\u2139\ufe0f Brak danych szkoleniowych.\")\n            self.loader_label.show()\n            return\n\n        self.model.populate_data(stages)\n        \n        # Zasiedl filtry unikalnymi warto\u015bciami\n        self.populate_filters(stages)\n        \n        # Wymu\u015b szeroko\u015b\u0107 pierwszej kolumny (Etap/U\u017cytkownik/Szkolenie)\n        self.tree.setColumnWidth(0, 450)\n        \n        # Rozwi\u0144 pierwszy poziom (etapy)\n        for i in range(self.model.rowCount()):\n            self.tree.expand(self.model.index(i, 0))\n            \n        # Uruchom pocz\u0105tkowe filtrowanie (np. dla domy\u015blnego \"Aktywne\")\n        self.filter_data()\n\n        # Podepnij reakcj\u0119 na zmiany\n        self.model.dataChanged.connect(self.on_model_data_changed)\n\n    def populate_filters(self, stages):\n        \"\"\"Zasiedla listy wielokrotnego wyboru unikalnymi warto\u015bciami z danych.\"\"\"\n        etapy = sorted(list(set(s['Nazwa'] for s in stages)))\n        tematy = set()\n        szkolenia = set()\n        \n        for s in stages:\n            for emp in s.get('Employees', []):\n                for t in emp.get('Trainings', []):\n                    if t.get('Temat'): tematy.add(t['Temat'])\n                    if t.get('SzkolenieNazwa'): szkolenia.add(t['SzkolenieNazwa'])\n        \n        self.filters_panel.combo_etap.blockSignals(True)\n        self.filters_panel.combo_etap.clear()\n        self.filters_panel.combo_etap.addItems(etapy)\n        self.filters_panel.combo_etap.blockSignals(False)\n\n        self.filters_panel.combo_temat.blockSignals(True)\n        self.filters_panel.combo_temat.clear()\n        self.filters_panel.combo_temat.addItems(sorted(list(tematy)))\n        self.filters_panel.combo_temat.blockSignals(False)\n\n        self.filters_panel.combo_nazwa.blockSignals(True)\n        self.filters_panel.combo_nazwa.clear()\n        self.filters_panel.combo_nazwa.addItems(sorted(list(szkolenia)))\n        self.filters_panel.combo_nazwa.blockSignals(False)\n\n    def filter_data(self):\n        \"\"\"Hierarchiczne filtrowanie drzewa.\"\"\"\n        search_text = \"\" # Filtr tekstowy usuni\u0119ty z UI\n        sel_etapy = self.filters_panel.combo_etap.currentData()\n        sel_tematy = self.filters_panel.combo_temat.currentData()\n        sel_nazwy = self.filters_panel.combo_nazwa.currentData()\n        status_filter = self.filters_panel.status_combo.currentText()\n        date_from = self.filters_panel.date_from.date()\n        date_to = self.filters_panel.date_to.date()\n\n        # Ukryj/poka\u017c wiersze (od do\u0142u do g\u00f3ry w hierarchii)\n        for i in range(self.model.rowCount()):\n            stage_idx = self.model.index(i, 0)\n            stage_match = self._filter_stage_recursive(stage_idx, search_text, sel_etapy, sel_tematy, sel_nazwy, status_filter, date_from, date_to)\n            self.tree.setRowHidden(i, QModelIndex(), not stage_match)\n\n    def _filter_stage_recursive(self, index, search_text, sel_etapy, sel_tematy, sel_nazwy, status_filter, d_from, d_to):\n        \"\"\"Sprawdza czy dany wiersz (i jego dzieci) pasuj\u0105 do filtr\u00f3w.\"\"\"\n        dtype = index.data(Qt.UserRole + 1)\n        \n        # 1. Poziom Etapu\n        if dtype == 'etap':\n            # Je\u015bli wybrano konkretne etapy i ten nie pasuje \u2013 sprawdzamy dalej (lub ucinamy)\n            if sel_etapy and index.data(Qt.DisplayRole) not in sel_etapy:\n                return False\n            \n            # Etap pasuje je\u015bli CHOCIA\u017b JEDEN PRACOWNIK pasuje\n            any_emp_match = False\n            for r in range(self.model.rowCount(index)):\n                emp_idx = self.model.index(r, 0, index)\n                emp_match = self._filter_stage_recursive(emp_idx, search_text, sel_etapy, sel_tematy, sel_nazwy, status_filter, d_from, d_to)\n                self.tree.setRowHidden(r, index, not emp_match)\n                if emp_match: any_emp_match = True\n            return any_emp_match\n\n        # 2. Poziom Pracownika\n        if dtype == 'pracownik':\n            # Filtr Statusu\n            emp_status_val = index.siblingAtColumn(4).data(Qt.UserRole + 2) # int: 0, 1, 2\n            if status_filter == \"W trakcie\" and emp_status_val != 0: return False\n            if status_filter == \"Zaliczone\" and emp_status_val != 1: return False\n            if status_filter == \"Wykluczone\" and emp_status_val != 2: return False\n            if status_filter == \"Zako\u0144czone\" and emp_status_val == 0: return False\n            \n            # Filtr Daty Zaliczenia (kolumna 5)\n            if status_filter in (\"Zaliczone\", \"Zako\u0144czone\") or (d_from and d_to):\n                d_str = index.siblingAtColumn(5).data(Qt.DisplayRole)\n                if d_str and d_str != \"-\":\n                    try:\n                        q_date = QDate.fromString(str(d_str)[:10], \"yyyy-MM-dd\")\n                        if not (d_from <= q_date <= d_to): return False\n                    except: pass\n\n            # Filtr Tekstowy (Nazwisko/Login)\n            emp_name = str(index.data(Qt.DisplayRole)).lower()\n            emp_login = str(index.data(Qt.UserRole + 3) or \"\").lower()\n            if search_text and search_text not in emp_name and search_text not in emp_login:\n                return False\n\n            # 3. Poziom Szkolenia\n        if dtype == 'szkolenie':\n            # Filtr Tematu\n            t_temat = index.data(Qt.UserRole + 4) # Zak\u0142adam \u017ce model to ma\n            if sel_tematy and t_temat not in sel_tematy: return False\n            \n            # Filtr Nazwy Szkolenia\n            t_nazwa = index.data(Qt.DisplayRole)\n            if sel_nazwy and t_nazwa not in sel_nazwy: flags(self, index):\n        \"\"\"Kolumna Status (4) edytowalna dla pracownik\u00f3w. Data (1) i DataZaliczenia (5) dla pracownik\u00f3w i szkole\u0144.\"\"\"\n        base_flags = super().flags(index)\n        if not index.isValid():\n            return base_flags\n        dtype = index.siblingAtColumn(0).data(Qt.UserRole + 1)\n        col = index.column()\n        if col == 4 and dtype == 'pracownik':\n            return base_flags | Qt.ItemIsEditable\n        if col in (1, 5) and dtype in ('pracownik', 'szkolenie'):\n            return base_flags | Qt.ItemIsEditable\n        return base_flags & ~Qt.ItemIsEditable\n\n    def populate_data(self, stages: list):\n        try:\n            self.clear()\n            self.setHorizontalHeaderLabels([\n                \"Etap / U\u017cytkownik / Szkolenie\", \n                \"Data\",\n                \"RBH\",\n                \"Post\u0119p\", \n                \"Status\", \n                \"Data Zaliczenia\",\n                \"Nr Kadrowy\",\n                \"Nr Rekrutacji\",\n                \"Rodzaj\",\n                \"Data Zatrudnienia\"\n            ])\n            \n            for s in stages:\n                stage_name = s.get('Nazwa', '-')\n                stage_root = HierarchicalItem(stage_name, 'etap', s.get('Id'))\n                stage_root.setFont(QFont(\"Segoe UI\", 10, QFont.Bold))\n                \n                # Pracownicy w Etapie\n                for emp in s.get('Employees', []):\n                    emp_name = emp.get('UzytkownikDane', '-')\n                    emp_item = HierarchicalItem(emp_name, 'pracownik', emp.get('UEId'))\n                    emp_item.setForeground(QColor(\"#3498db\"))\n                    emp_item.setData(emp.get('PracownikId'), Qt.UserRole + 3) # Login/Email\n                    \n                    # Logika Post\u0119pu: SumaRBH / StageLimit, max 99% (chyba \u017ce StatusZaliczenia=1)\n                    emp_sum_rbh = emp.get('SumaRBH', 0)\n                    is_zaliczony = (emp.get('StatusZaliczenia') == 1)\n                    \n                    if stage_limit_rbh > 0:\n                        calc_progress = (emp_sum_rbh / stage_limit_rbh) * 100\n                    else:\n                        calc_progress = 0\n                        \n                    if is_zaliczony:\n                        final_progress = 100\n                    else:\n                        final_progress = min(99, calc_progress)\n                        \n                    # Mapowanie RodzajZatrudnienia: 1 -> Stacjonarny, 5 -> Zdalny\n                    rodzaj_val = emp.get('RodzajZatrudnienia')\n                    rodzaj_map = {1: \"Stacjonarny\", 5: \"Zdalny\"}\n                    rodzaj_str = rodzaj_map.get(rodzaj_val, str(rodzaj_val or '-'))\n                    \n                    # Mapowanie StatusZaliczenia: 0-W trakcie, 1-Zaliczony, 2-Wykluczony\n                    status_val = emp.get('StatusZaliczenia', 0)\n                    status_map_text = {0: \"W trakcie\", 1: \"Zaliczony\", 2: \"Wykluczony\"}\n                    \n                    status_item = QStandardItem(status_map_text.get(status_val, \"W trakcie\"))\n                    status_item.setData(\"status_combo\", Qt.UserRole + 1)\n                    status_item.setData(status_val, Qt.UserRole + 2)\n                    # Kluczowe: ustaw flagi bezpo\u015brednio na itemu (QStandardItemModel sprawdza item.flags())\n                    status_item.setFlags(Qt.ItemIsEnabled | Qt.ItemIsSelectable | Qt.ItemIsEditable)\n                    \n                    emp_row = [\n                        emp_item,\n                        QStandardItem(\"-\"),\n                        QStandardItem(str(emp_sum_rbh)), # RBH pracownika\n                        QStandardItem(f\"{final_progress:.0f}%\"),\n                        status_item,\n                        QStandardItem(str(emp.get('DataZaliczenia') or '-')),\n                        QStandardItem(str(emp.get('NumerKadrowy') or '-')),\n                        QStandardItem(str(emp.get('NumerRekrutacji') or '-')),\n                        QStandardItem(rodzaj_str),\n                        QStandardItem(str(emp.get('DataZatrudnienia') or ''))\n                    ]\n                    \n                    stage_root.appendRow(emp_row)\n                    \n                    # Szkolenia Pracownika\n                    for t in emp.get('Trainings', []):\n                        t_label = f\"{t.get('Temat', '')} - {t.get('SzkolenieNazwa', '')}\"\n                        t_item = HierarchicalItem(t_label, 'szkolenie', t.get('MappingId'))\n                        t_item.setData(t.get('Temat'), Qt.UserRole + 4)\n                        t_item.setData(t.get('SzkolenieNazwa'), Qt.UserRole + 5)\n                        f = QFont(\"Segoe UI\", 9)\n                        f.setItalic(True)\n                        t_item.setFont(f)\n                        \n                        t_date = t.get('DataZaliczenia', '')\n                        t_rbh = t.get('RBH', 0)\n                        \n                        item_date = QStandardItem(t_date)\n                        item_date.setData(t_date, Qt.EditRole)\n                        item_date.setData(\"date\", Qt.UserRole + 1)\n                        \n                        item_rbh = QStandardItem(str(t_rbh))\n                        item_rbh.setData(t_rbh, Qt.UserRole + 2)\n                        \n                        t_row = [\n                            t_item,\n                            item_date,\n                            item_rbh,\n                            QStandardItem(\"-\"),\n                            QStandardItem(\"-\"), # Tu nie ma checkboxa dla szkolenia (zgodnie z pro\u015bb\u0105 \"Checkbox tylko w wierszach z UzytkownikDane\")\n                            QStandardItem(\"-\"),\n                            QStandardItem(\"-\"),\n                            QStandardItem(\"-\"),\n                            QStandardItem(\"-\"),\n                            QStandardItem(\"-\")\n                        ]\n                        \n                        emp_item.appendRow(t_row)\n        finally:\n            pass\n", "encoding": "utf-8"}, {"path": "training_module/training_views/training_widgets.py", "content": "# training_module/training_views/training_widgets.py\n\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (\n    QWidget, QVBoxLayout, QHBoxLayout, QLabel, \n    QPushButton, QFrame, QScrollArea, QSizePolicy\n)\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import Qt, Signal\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import QFont, QColor\nfrom styles import AppStyles\n\nclass ExpanderWidget(QFrame):\n    \"\"\"\n    Bazowy wid\u017cet \"rozwijany\" z nag\u0142\u00f3wkiem i obszarem zawarto\u015bci.\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, title_widget, content_widget, expanded=False, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self.expanded = expanded\n        self.content_area = content_widget\n        self.title_area = title_widget\n        \n        self.setup_ui()\n        self.update_expansion()\n\n    def setup_ui(self):\n        self.main_layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        self.main_layout.setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0)\n        self.main_layout.setSpacing(0)\n        \n        # Header Container\n        self.header_frame = QFrame()\n        self.header_layout = QHBoxLayout(self.header_frame)\n        self.header_layout.setContentsMargins(10, 5, 10, 5)\n        \n        # Expand/Collapse Toggle\n        self.toggle_btn = QPushButton(\"\u25b6\")\n        self.toggle_btn.setFixedSize(20, 20)\n        self.toggle_btn.setFlat(True)\n        self.toggle_btn.clicked.connect(self.toggle_expansion)\n        \n        self.header_layout.addWidget(self.toggle_btn)\n        self.header_layout.addWidget(self.title_area, 1)\n        \n        self.main_layout.addWidget(self.header_frame)\n        self.main_layout.addWidget(self.content_area)\n        \n        # Styling\n        theme = \"dark\" # Mo\u017cna pobra\u0107 z parenta w przysz\u0142o\u015bci\n        self.header_frame.setStyleSheet(f\"background-color: {AppStyles.DARK_BACKGROUND_HOVER}; border-radius: 4px;\")\n        self.setStyleSheet(f\"QFrame {{ border: 1px solid {AppStyles.DARK_BORDER_SECONDARY}; border-radius: 4px; }}\")\n\n    def toggle_expansion(self):\n        self.expanded = not self.expanded\n        self.update_expansion()\n\n    def update_expansion(self):\n        self.content_area.setVisible(self.expanded)\n        self.toggle_btn.setText(\"\u25bc\" if self.expanded else \"\u25b6\")\n\n    def update_theme(self, theme):\n        self.theme = theme\n        if theme == 'dark':\n            self.header_frame.setStyleSheet(f\"background-color: {AppStyles.DARK_BACKGROUND_HOVER}; border-radius: 4px;\")\n            self.setStyleSheet(f\"QFrame {{ border: 1px solid {AppStyles.DARK_BORDER_SECONDARY}; border-radius: 4px; }}\")\n        else:\n            self.header_frame.setStyleSheet(f\"background-color: {AppStyles.LIGHT_BACKGROUND_HOVER}; border-radius: 4px;\")\n            self.setStyleSheet(f\"QFrame {{ border: 1px solid {AppStyles.LIGHT_BORDER_PRIMARY}; border-radius: 4px; }}\")\n            \n        # Propagacja do obszaru tytu\u0142u i zawarto\u015bci\n        for area in (self.title_area, self.content_area):\n            if hasattr(area, 'update_theme'):\n                area.update_theme(theme)\n            # Je\u015bli to zwyk\u0142y QWidget, szukaj w jego layoutcie\n            layout = area.layout()\n            if layout:\n                for i in range(layout.count()):\n                    item = layout.itemAt(i)\n                    if item and item.widget() and hasattr(item.widget(), 'update_theme'):\n                        item.widget().update_theme(theme)\n\nclass TrainingStageCard(ExpanderWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    Karta etapu szkoleniowego (Poziom 1).\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, stage_data, stats_data, data_provider, parent=None):\n        self.data_provider = data_provider\n        self.stage_id = stage_data['Id']\n        self.stage_data = stage_data\n        self.stats_data = stats_data\n        self._employees_loaded = False\n        \n        # Placeholder\n        self.loading_label = QLabel(\"<i>\u0141adowanie pracownik\u00f3w...</i>\")\n        self.content_layout.addWidget(self.loading_label)\n            \n        super().__init__(title_widget, self.content_container, expanded=False, parent=parent)\n        \n        # Inicjalizacja poprzez Theming Manager\n        theme = \"dark\"\n        p = parent\n        while p:\n            if hasattr(p, 'is_dark_theme'):\n                theme = \"dark\" if p.is_dark_theme else \"light\"\n                break\n            p = p.parent()\n        self.update_theme(theme)\n        \n    def update_theme(self, theme):\n        super().update_theme(theme)\n        if theme == 'dark':\n            self.header_frame.setStyleSheet(f\"background-color: {AppStyles.DARK_BACKGROUND_CONTROLS}; border-bottom: 1px solid {AppStyles.DARK_BORDER_PRIMARY};\")\n        else:\n            self.header_frame.setStyleSheet(f\"background-color: {AppStyles.LIGHT_BACKGROUND_CONTROLS}; border-bottom: 1px solid {AppStyles.LIGHT_BORDER_PRIMARY};\")\n\n    def toggle_expansion(self):\n        if not self.expanded and not self._employees_loaded:\n            self.load_employees()\n        super().toggle_expansion()\n\n    def load_employees(self):\n        \"\"\"Pobiera i wy\u015bwietla list\u0119 pracownik\u00f3w dla tego etapu.\"\"\"\n        # Wyczy\u015b\u0107 placeholder\n        if hasattr(self, 'loading_label'):\n            self.loading_label.deleteLater()\n            del self.loading_label\n\n        employees = self.data_provider.get_users_in_stage(self.stage_id)\n        \n        if not employees:\n            self.content_layout.addWidget(QLabel(\"<i>Brak przypisanych pracownik\u00f3w do tego etapu.</i>\"))\n        else:\n            for emp in employees:\n                emp_row = EmployeeExpandableRow(emp, self.stage_id, self.data_provider)\n                self.content_layout.addWidget(emp_row)\n        \n        self._employees_loaded = True\n        \n        # To jest teraz int\n        self.stage_id = stage_id\n        \n        # Title Widget\n        title_widget = QWidget()\n        title_layout = QHBoxLayout(title_widget)\n        title_layout.setContentsMargins(5, 2, 5, 2)\n        \n        name_label = QLabel(f\"{emp_data.get('PracownikNazwisko') or self.emp_id}\")\n        dept_label = QLabel(f\"\ud83c\udfe2 {emp_data.get('Wydzial') or '-'}\")\n        sup_label = QLabel(f\"\ud83d\udc64 {emp_data.get('Przelozony') or '-'}\")\n        self.progress_label = QLabel(f\"{emp_data.get('ProcentUkoczenia', 0)}%\")\n        self.progress = emp_data.get('ProcentUkoczenia', 0)\n        \n        for lbl in (name_label, dept_label, sup_label, self.progress_label):\n            title_layout.addWidget(lbl)\n            title_layout.addStretch()\n        \n        # Inicjalizacja poprzez Theming Manager (wykrywa rodzica)\n        theme = \"dark\"\n        p = parent\n        while p:\n            if hasattr(p, 'is_dark_theme'):\n                theme = \"dark\" if p.is_dark_theme else \"light\"\n                break\n            p = p.parent()\n        self.update_theme(theme)\n\n    def update_theme(self, theme):\n        super().update_theme(theme)\n        self.header_frame.setStyleSheet(\"background-color: transparent;\")\n        border_color = AppStyles.DARK_BORDER_PRIMARY if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.LIGHT_BORDER_PRIMARY\n        self.setStyleSheet(f\"QFrame {{ border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid {border_color}; }}\")\n        \n        text_color = AppStyles.DARK_TEXT_PRIMARY if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.LIGHT_TEXT_PRIMARY\n        for lbl in self.title_labels:\n            lbl.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {text_color};\")\n            \n        progress_color = AppStyles.DARK_TEXT_PRIMARY if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.LIGHT_TEXT_PRIMARY\n        if self.progress >= 100:\n            progress_color = AppStyles.STATUS_SUCCESS_DARK if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.STATUS_SUCCESS_LIGHT\n        elif self.progress > 0:\n            progress_color = AppStyles.STATUS_WARNING_DARK if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.STATUS_WARNING_LIGHT\n        self.progress_label.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {progress_color}; font-weight: bold;\")\n\n    def toggle_expansion(self):\n        if not self.expanded:\n            self.load_trainings()\n        super().toggle_expansion()\n\n    def load_trainings(self):\n        # Clear existing\n        while self.trainings_layout.count():\n            item = self.trainings_layout.takeAt(0)\n            if item.widget():\n                item.widget().deleteLater()\n        \n        trainings = self.data_provider.get_employee_trainings_in_stage(self.emp_id, self.stage_id)\n        if not trainings:\n            self.trainings_layout.addWidget(QLabel(\"<i>Brak szczeg\u00f3\u0142owych danych o szkoleniach</i>\"))\n        else:\n            for t in trainings:\n                t_row = TrainingDetailRow(t, self)\n                self.trainings_layout.addWidget(t_row)\n\nclass TrainingDetailRow(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    Szczeg\u00f3\u0142y szkolenia (Poziom 3).\n    \"\"\"\n    def __init__(self, training_data, parent=None):\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        layout = QHBoxLayout(self)\n        layout.setContentsMargins(10, 2, 10, 2)\n        layout.setSpacing(15)\n        \n        # 1. Nazwa szkolenia\n        name = training_data.get('SzkolenieNazwa', 'Nieznane szkolenie')\n        self.name_label = QLabel(name)\n        self.name_label.setToolTip(name)\n        \n        # 2. Data szkolenia\n        date_from = training_data.get('DataOd')\n        date_to = training_data.get('DataDo')\n        \n        # Formatowanie daty je\u015bli to obiekty datetime\n        if hasattr(date_from, 'strftime'):\n             date_from_str = date_from.strftime('%d.%m.%Y')\n        else:\n             date_from_str = str(date_from)\n             \n        if hasattr(date_to, 'strftime'):\n             date_to_str = date_to.strftime('%d.%m.%Y')\n        else:\n             date_to_str = str(date_to)\n             \n        self.date_label = QLabel(f\"\ud83d\udcc5 {date_from_str} - {date_to_str}\")\n        \n        # 3. Liczba godzin\n        hours = training_data.get('LiczbaGodzin')\n        if hours is None:\n            # Pr\u00f3ba wyliczenia je\u015bli brak w bazie\n            days = training_data.get('LiczbaDni', 1)\n            hours = days * 8 # Za\u0142o\u017cenie 8h na dzie\u0144\n            \n        self.hours_label = QLabel(f\"\u23f1\ufe0f {hours}h\")\n        \n        # 4. Symbol z grafiku\n        symbol = training_data.get('Symbol')\n        self.symbol_text = f\"\ud83d\udcca {symbol}\" if symbol else \"\ud83d\udcca -\"\n        self.symbol_label = QLabel(self.symbol_text)\n        \n        # 5. Przycisk akcji\n        self.btn_action = QPushButton(\"Otw\u00f3rz\")\n        self.btn_action.setFixedSize(70, 24)\n        self.btn_action.setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor)\n        \n        layout.addWidget(self.name_label, 1) # Pozwala nazwie zaj\u0105\u0107 wolne miejsce\n        layout.addWidget(self.date_label)\n        layout.addWidget(self.hours_label)\n        layout.addWidget(self.symbol_label)\n        layout.addWidget(self.btn_action)\n        \n        # Inicjalizacja motywu na podstawie rodzica\n        theme = \"dark\"\n        curr = self\n        while curr:\n            if hasattr(curr, 'theme'):\n                theme = curr.theme\n                break\n            curr = curr.parent()\n            \n        self.update_theme(theme)\n\n    def update_theme(self, theme):\n        self.theme = theme\n        text_color = AppStyles.DARK_TEXT_PRIMARY if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.LIGHT_TEXT_PRIMARY\n        secondary_color = \"#adb5bd\" if theme == \"dark\" else \"#6c757d\"\n        \n        self.name_label.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {text_color}; font-weight: bold; font-size: 9pt;\")\n        self.date_label.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {secondary_color}; font-size: 9pt;\")\n        self.hours_label.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {secondary_color}; font-size: 9pt;\")\n        \n        # Symbol wyr\u00f3\u017cniony je\u015bli istnieje\n        if \"\ud83d\udcca -\" not in self.symbol_text:\n             accent = AppStyles.STATUS_SUCCESS_DARK if theme == \"dark\" else AppStyles.STATUS_SUCCESS_LIGHT\n             self.symbol_label.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {accent}; font-weight: bold; font-size: 9pt;\")\n        else:\n             self.symbol_label.setStyleSheet(f\"color: {secondary_color}; font-size: 9pt;\")\n             \n        self.btn_action.setStyleSheet(AppStyles.get_small_button_style(theme))\n", "encoding": "utf-8"}, {"path": "training_module/training_views/__init__.py", "content": "# Inicjalizacja pakietu training_views\n", "encoding": "utf-8"}]}
